Iron Powder.conversationtext: Need Iron powder? Just provide the ore, and I'll transform it into powder as fine as any you've seen. Remember, quality comes at a price.
Iron Powder.craftcompletetext: The perfect consistency! Ideal for any number of applications. You've got yourself a premium product here.

Copper Powder.conversationtext: Provide me with the ore, and I'll produce a copper powder that's as fine as it is useful. You won't be disappointed.
Copper Powder.craftcompletetext: This batch of Copper powder turned out exceptionally well. Fine, pure, and ready for use. It's exactly what you were looking for.

Cobalt Powder.conversationtext: Bring me some Cobalt ore and I'll happily transform it into a useful powder for a price.
Cobalt Powder.craftcompletetext: Now that is some high quality Cobalt powder!

Rubysilver Powder.conversationtext: Bring me some Rubysilver ore and I'll happily transform it into a useful powder form for a price.
Rubysilver Powder.craftcompletetext: Ah I feel like a young alchemist working with that wonderful stone.

Silver Powder.conversationtext: Silver in your hands? Let's turn it into powder. The process is delicate, but the result is a wonderfully versatile product.
Silver Powder.craftcompletetext: Your silver powder is ready. Its quality and fine texture are unmatched, suitable for a range of uses.

Gold Powder.conversationtext: Ah, your intrigues are never less than opulent. Bring me gold ore and I will gladly transform it into gold powder for you.
Gold Powder.craftcompletetext: Some of my finest milling work. The quality can be felt in it's glimmer.

Froststone Powder.conversationtext: Oh, what do we have here... Shall we capture the icy essence of the Frost Mountain in it's finest form?
Froststone Powder.craftcompletetext: An illustrious result of alchemical metallurgy. Your froststone powder is prepared.

Tidestone Powder.conversationtext: Bring me some Tidestone ore and I'll happily transform it into a useful powder form for a price.
Tidestone Powder.craftcompletetext: An illustrious result of alchemical metallurgy. Your Tidestone powder is prepared.

Obsidian Powder.conversationtext: If you bring me obsidian ore, I can reduce it to a fine, high-quality powder at a modest cost.
Obsidian Powder.craftcompletetext: The obsidian powder is ready. Take a moment to feel the texture of its finely ground grains.

Brimston Powder.conversationtext: Bring me some brimstone and I'll happily transform it into a useful powder form for a price.
Brimston Powder.craftcompletetext: An illustrious result of alchemical metallurgy. Your brimstone powder is ready.

Potion of Healing.craftcompletetext: The transformation is finished. Your concoction gleams with promise.

Marks of Malice.greetingtext: Recently, the number of patients has increased sharply, and I need more supplies immediately. Many of them have wounds carved deep into their skin. Some are remarkably clean cuts, while others are rough, as if made by an inexperienced hand. There is something unsettling about these wounds.
Marks of Malice.completetext: While you were gone, I confirmed my hypothesis. They're not healing like they should, and I can't help but wonder if whatever was used to make those cuts was coated in some kind of poison. I need to look into something, and I'll need your help soon, so hurry back.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Bandage]] (any rarity) (1x)

Marks of Malice.rewards:
30 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Surgical Kit|Common Surgical Kit]]
2 [[Arcane Essence|Uncommon Arcane Essence]]
25 Experience
10 Affinity

In the Name of Progress.greetingtext: My brother is a physician, but there are things in this world that cannot be treated with a scalpel. Such cursed entities and other abnormalities exist and some have even been encountered in the Ruins. They do not behave like anything that truly lives. We alchemists must study them.
In the Name of Progress.completetext: As I have grown older, my knowledge has increased, yet there is still much left to learn in this world. The entities found in the Ruins are among them. It is time for a more thorough examination of things whose nature remains unknown.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Living Armor]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (2x)

Whispers of the Past.greetingtext: I've been investigating the Spectral Knight's chambers, and I've found signs of recent activity. Something happened there recently, and I need you to search for traces of a ritual. It's vital we uncover what was done, as it could give us a clearer understanding of what we're up against.
Whispers of the Past.completetext: What you found in those chambers paints a clearer picture, but there's still much to unravel. The ritual is tied to the curse, and we're getting closer to understanding its source.

Behind the Deception.greetingtext: A mimic deceives by nature. It lives, yet mimics the lifeless. It exists, yet pretends it does not. But nothing is ever perfectly concealed. Everything leaves traces somewhere. Kill one and bring me one of its teeth.
Behind the Deception.completetext: Interesting. Even a creature built for deception cannot conceal its essence in death. This specimen should prove to be an invaluable subject of study. I expect the experiments will be quite enlightening.

Beasts of the Dark Forest.greetingtext: Creatures able to survive in a near pitch black forest are worth studying in their own right. Of particular interest to me are the wolves known to dwell there. There must be a reason they endure in conditions like that. I find myself wondering if the answer lies in their eyes. Bring me one of those unnaturally gleaming eyes.
Beasts of the Dark Forest.completetext: Good... the eye still gleams, its surface slick with blood. The beast's blood has yet to dry. I must examine this immediately.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Blue Eyeballs]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled)

What Cannot Be Heard.greetingtext: Bats that dwell where no light reaches are acutely sensitive to sound. Their ears detect even the faintest vibrations, including those that ripple from beyond. Sever one ear from these shadowed predators and bring it to me.
What Cannot Be Heard.completetext: Well done. The ear still trembles with an unnatural resonance, as though it drinks in the silence around it. Perhaps these creatures see what we cannot see, and hear what we cannot hear. I find myself genuinely curious about what that might be...

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Giant Bat Ear]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled)

Undead Eradication.completetext: Truly remarkable. Even after a thousand years, no one could have anticipated results like these. To properly understand those creatures, one must be willing to endure rather brutal methods. My brother would despise this, but there are things in this world that simply must be done.

They crawl out from those wretched pots that have been sitting in the castle untouched for years! If you destroy enough of those pots, it might send those spiders back into hiding for good.
Webs of Fate.completetext: That will show them! I don't expect to hear any more stories about spiders haunting the halls of that cursed castle... Thanks again for all your efforts.

Death Awakens.completetext: Thanks for taking care of that mess for me... I was beginning to think I might have gone too far with that last experiment. Here, these should cover any trouble I caused you.

Oh Brother.greetingtext: You know, my brother, the Surgeon, has never forgiven me for abandoning traditional medicine. He still believes in the old ways, as if stitching up the body can heal the soul—curses, for example. I learned that lesson too late. Our mother died in agony, and I was powerless to help. That's when alchemy called to me—its promise of real power, of true healing. I need these potions, not just for myself, but to show him the way forward. He'll see the truth eventually... even if I have to make him understand the hard way.
Oh Brother.completetext: Good. This is only the beginning, but it's a step in the right direction. My brother's methods are futile, bound by the limitations of the past. Alchemy has no such boundaries. I can feel it working already. The potions, the combinations—each one brings us closer to something greater. He may not see it now, but I will show him the power we could wield if he just opened his eyes.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Potion of Healing]] (any rarity) (1x), Fetch [[Potion of Protection]] (any rarity) (1x), Fetch [[Potion of Invisibility]] (any rarity) (1x)

Oh Brother.rewards:
125 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Arcane Essence|Rare Arcane Essence]]
1 [[Random Rare Armor|Random Rare Armor]]
200 Experience

The Kobold's Chemistry.greetingtext: I've always been intrigued by the Ice Kobolds. Their adaptability, their strange tenacity... it's more than mere survival—it's something we can learn from. Their biology, their resistance to the cold, could unlock new alchemical properties. What I need from you is to search their territory—there may be something in their environment, or even within their own flesh, we can use. Their blood, their marrow, perhaps even their mucus.
The Kobold's Chemistry.completetext: Excellent. What you've uncovered is fascinating. The Kobolds are far more than just beasts—they're carriers of hidden potential. This reminds me of another experiment I need to conduct. Visit me when you have the time.

If something powerful is hidden there, it may hold the answers to many questions.
More Than Meets the Eye.completetext: Impressive. You have uncovered more than I anticipated. Well done, but we are not finished. I will need time to study what you found. Come back when I have made some progress.

What Cannot Be Seen.completetext: Searching for what is hidden has a way of revealing what was never meant to be found. There seems to be something within the Frost Mountain. We should look into it.

For now, the shells of lava turtles will do nicely.

Not a single part of their bodies goes to waste. They produce various essences according to their innate nature, an especially useful property. Lava slimes should contain magma essence, so bring me some.
Dangerous Applications.completetext: The heat is remarkable. Mishandling this could easily cause burns. Hm, what if an explosive property were added to it. Smaller than a Smaller than an Explosive Bottle, yet far more powerful. It would certainly be worth researching.

Traces of the Blessing.greetingtext: Surviving the tempestuous sea is no small matter, even for monsters. It is said the Tidewalkers place enchanted necklaces upon the warriors who return from the maelstrom, gifts woven with a shaman's blessing. The warrior protects the shaman, and the shaman shields the tribe. I wonder what truths lie hidden within such a blessing. I will need a few items, worn and weathered by their hands.
Traces of the Blessing.completetext: Hmm... this is a very old kind of magic. Both the necklace and the fragment carry similar traces. This enchantment protects its bearer and strengthens the bond of trust between them. It seems well-suited to bind a tribe together as one. But I will need to study it further before I can say more.

Now go, adventurer... and bring me the spoils of your victory.

Under its influence, fiendlings are subject to the will of higher demons. This is a forbidden art among men... which only makes it more valuable. Bring me a few. I would see them for myself.
The Binding Mark.completetext: Hm... far more refined than I expected. This is not mere control, but something closer to reshaping the consciousness itself. With a structure like this... the range of applications could be quite broad. Further experimentation will be required.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Fiendling Crusher]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (10x), Kill [[Fiendling Slasher]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (10x), Fetch [[Brand of the Subservient]] (any rarity) (8x) (Looted/Handled)

The Binding Mark.rewards:
500 Experience
225 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Legendary Weapon|Random Legendary Weapon]]
1 [[Random Legendary Armor|Random Legendary Armor]]
2 [[Arcane Essence|Legend Arcane Essence]]

Limits of Control.greetingtext: We must determine whether these marks are found only on lesser demons. To bind a stronger one, the structure would have to be far more complex. Go deeper into the Inferno and slay the more formidable kind, then confirm it for me. If any trace of the mark remains, it should not be difficult to find.
Limits of Control.completetext: Did anything stand out? ...Nothing, I see. A pity. If complete control had already been achieved, they would have spread far beyond their current bounds. Which means the process is still incomplete. I will continue my experiments with what I have.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Hell Hunter]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (3x), Kill [[Demon Berserker]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (5x), Kill [[Ghoul]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (5x)

Limits of Control.rewards:
500 Experience
225 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Legendary Weapon|Random Legendary Weapon]]
1 [[Random Legendary Armor|Random Legendary Armor]]
2 [[Arcane Essence|Legend Arcane Essence]]

Remnants of Death.greetingtext: Objects that brush against death retain a great deal of residue. Those steeped in blood all the more so. Most would shun them as unsettling... to me they are specimens worth observing. I require such items. Will you bring them to me?
Remnants of Death.completetext: Excellent. This will be quite useful. Do not look at me that way. All of this is merely a necessary step toward better results. There is work that must be done. I will not forget your efforts.

Cobalt Ingot.conversationtext: There is a familiar face! Supply me with some Cobalt ore and I will quickly turn them into pure Cobalt ingots.
Cobalt Ingot.craftcompletetext: Now that's a wonderful metal! There is nothing quite like shimmering Cobalt.

Copper Ingot.conversationtext: In need of refined Copper? Provide me with the ore, and I'll smelt and craft it into high-quality copper ingots. Let's get started.
Copper Ingot.craftcompletetext: Your copper ingots are ready. Smooth, strong, and shining. Ready for use!

Froststone Ingot.conversationtext: You wish to meld ice and stone into something extraordinary? Even the improbable is possible in my seasoned hands.
Froststone Ingot.craftcompletetext: Ah, an exceptional meld of froststone that even the Frost Giants would respect and utilize in their crafts.

Gold Ingot.conversationtext: Supply me with gold ore and with skilled hands, I will smelt you pure gold ingots, traveler.
Gold Ingot.craftcompletetext: Now there is a metal of beauty! Gleaming gold ingots, smelted in marvelous quality.

Iron Ingot.conversationtext: Welcome back! If you have Iron ore, I can work my magic and turn it into top-quality Iron ingots. Just leave it to me.
Iron Ingot.craftcompletetext: These Iron ingots turned out perfectly! Strong, reliable, and ready for use. Iron like this is hard to come by.

Obsidian Ingot.conversationtext: Did you bring obsidian ore? If you hand it over to me, I'll refine it into a high-quality obsidian ingot by removing the impurities.
Obsidian Ingot.craftcompletetext: The obsidian ingot is ready. Take a look at its smooth, light-reflecting surface.

Rubysilver Ingot.conversationtext: It always amazes me that you can extract such a magical metal from such ugly stone.
Rubysilver Ingot.craftcompletetext: Now that there is an amazing metal! There is nothing quite like pure elegant Rubysilver.

Silver Ingot.conversationtext: Welcome! Bring me your silver coins or ore and I'll work them into pristine ingots.
Silver Ingot.craftcompletetext: Here you go, beautiful right? Silver has a charm all its own.

Tidestone Ingot.conversationtext: In need of refined Tidestone? Bring me the raw ore, and I will forge it into high-quality Tidestone ingots.
Tidestone Ingot.craftcompletetext: The Tidestone ingot is complete. Items forged from this ingot will perform especially well underwater.

Forged from Ruin.greetingtext: The world doesn't give second chances. Trust me, I've seen it take everything from people. Cobalt is a rare metal—used to forge weapons and armor that can help one survive in otherwise dire situations. Too many adventurers and warriors come to me thinking they can rely on luck, and they end up as nothing but wreckage. Bring me the ore, and we'll craft something with strength that won't break when everything else does.
Forged from Ruin.completetext: Impressive. This metal is just the start. The armor I'll craft with it will be something worth relying on. It's not just about the steel—it's about what it represents. It's strength, it's survival... it's knowing what this world can do, and preparing for it.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Cobalt Ore]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled)

Forged from Ruin.rewards:
50 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
4 [[Arcane Essence|Uncommon Arcane Essence]]
50 Experience
25 Affinity

Damned Survivor.greetingtext: I'm dealing with something I wouldn't wish on my worst enemy. My wife was taken—pulled from me by a dark force that I couldn't fight. I thought I'd never see her again. But she's back, though not in the way I'd hoped. Things were done to her—things that should never happen to anyone. I've spoken to someone who may have answers, but first, I need to gather certain items, things that might help us help her.
Damned Survivor.completetext: My wife was tortured, branded like livestock, forced into rituals that I can hardly describe. They cut her, bled her, and left her for dead. When I found her, she was a shell—her body marked with symbols, her soul broken. I thought I could save her, but I'm not sure anymore. The woman I married is gone, replaced by someone who looks like her, but isn't. If you can help, maybe... just maybe, I'll get her back.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Zombie]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (2x), Kill [[Giant Dragonfly]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (2x)

Damned Survivor.rewards:
50 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Uncommon Weapon|Random Uncommon Weapon]]
50 Experience

Slipping Away.greetingtext: I can't bear to watch her slip away. I'm gathering a few of my comrades to join me, but I won't ask them to help without making sure they're ready. We need armor—armor that will hold up against what's waiting for us. The clock's ticking, and I don't think she has much time left.
Slipping Away.completetext: This is a solid start, but we're not prepared yet. There's more to be done, and time isn't on our side. Come back later. I've got to consult with the brothers and see if they've discovered anything that might give us an edge.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch Uncommon Armor (2x)

Slipping Away.rewards:
50 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Uncommon Armor|Random Uncommon Armor]]
75 Experience
25 Affinity

Lobster Red.greetingtext: Rubysilver Ore... that stuff's been known to make some of the most durable armor I've ever seen... If you fetch me some, I might be able to make you something out of it in the future.
Lobster Red.completetext: Yeah... this is the stuff... I'll see what I can do with this, but for now I need your help with a another matter.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Rubysilver Ore]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled)

Lobster Red.rewards:
75 Experience
75 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Rare Armor|Random Rare Armor]]

Graveyard Shift.greetingtext: All kinds of adventurers have been buried in that old graveyard in the Ruins... Go check it out... you might even find something royal.
Graveyard Shift.completetext: I hope it wasn't too dangerous out there... that place is notorious for grave robbers, But if I'd told you that earlier, I doubt you would've taken the journey.

objectives.objectivessummary: Explore [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] Graveyard module (1x)

Graveyard Shift.rewards:
100 Experience
100 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Rare Armor|Random Rare Armor]]

Something Supernatural.greetingtext: The Ruins have filled up with animated Slime and Wisps lately... please... can you deal with them before it gets out of hand?
Something Supernatural.completetext: I know it wasn't easy... but take this for your effort. It should be much easier to get inside the castle now.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Wisp]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (3x), Kill [[Slime]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (3x)

Something Supernatural.rewards:
100 Experience
100 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Rare Weapon|Random Rare Weapon]]

Ore of the Blue Maelstrom.greetingtext: There's an ore they say can only be found in the Blue Maelstrom. Could you get some for me? It's a new material, so I'd love to go see it for myself... but I get awful seasickness, you see. So I'll leave it to you.
Ore of the Blue Maelstrom.completetext: You brought it back! I've never seen ore with patterns like this before. I wonder if they'll still remain after it's been smelted. I need to get my hands on this new material. Let's see how far I can work it.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Tidestone Ore]] (any rarity) (3x) (Looted/Handled)

Ore of the Blue Maelstrom.rewards:
100 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Rare Armor|Random Rare Armor]]
175 Experience

Shells and Spines.greetingtext: I heard the creatures in the Blue Maelstrom have incredibly tough hides. Crab shells that don't even scratch under a blade, and sea urchin spines sharp enough to pierce metal armor. I suppose that's only natural, given how harsh the sea is out there. If you don't mind, could you bring me a few crab shells and urchin spines? I'd like to see if they can be used to reinforce armor.
Shells and Spines.completetext: Hmm, tough, sharp... and still carrying the full scent of the sea. I can't use them as they are. I'll need to wash and dry them properly first. Still, I think I can make a decent piece of armor out of these.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Hard Crab Shell]] (any rarity) (2x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Sharp Sea Urchin Spine]] (any rarity) (2x) (Looted/Handled)

Shells and Spines.rewards:
100 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Rare Weapon|Random Rare Weapon]]
1 [[Random Rare Armor|Random Rare Armor]]
200 Experience

Monsters Among the Waves.greetingtext: Dangerous places tend to have dangerous monsters. The Tidewalkers may wield crude weapons, but their aggression is no joke. And since they can move between water and land, they're even more of a threat. If you want to explore the Blue Maelstrom safely, it would be best to clear them out. I can't go there myself... so please, adventurer. Take care of the Tidewalkers.
Monsters Among the Waves.completetext: I'm glad to see you've returned in one piece. It's people like you that give meaning to the work I do. It makes me happy to know I was able to help, even just a little. I'll keep working to craft even sturdier armor from here on.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Tidewalker Spearer]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/ShipGraveyard-01-N ShipGraveyard] dungeon (5x), Kill [[Tidewalker Clubfighter]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/ShipGraveyard-01-N ShipGraveyard] dungeon (5x), Kill [[Tidewalker Shaman]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/ShipGraveyard-01-N ShipGraveyard] dungeon (2x)

Monsters Among the Waves.rewards:
100 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Rare Weapon|Random Rare Weapon]]
1 [[Random Rare Armor|Random Rare Armor]]
175 Experience
25 Affinity

The Difference in Craftsmanship.greetingtext: Armor is not meant to be strong alone. Careful finishing is what truly matters. Small differences like that are what make armor last. Too many advanced crafting techniques have been lost, but I hear finely made items from long ago still remain in the Forgotten Castle. Could you bring me a few?
The Difference in Craftsmanship.completetext: Thank you. At a glance these may seem to have nothing to do with making armor, but they are crafted with remarkably fine and complex techniques. Examining them piece by piece will be good study for me.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Hourglass]] (any rarity) (2x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Walking Cane]] (any rarity) (2x) (Looted/Handled)

The Difference in Craftsmanship.rewards:
150 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Rare Armor|Random Rare Armor]]
300 Experience
25 Affinity

Ale-Soaked Insights.greetingtext: Last night, I had a bit too much to drink at the tavern and ended up speaking with the Fortune Teller. She gave me a cryptic message suggesting there might be something worth investigating around this location. I'm not entirely convinced by her mumbo jumbo, but I figured it's worth a look. See if you can find anything unusual here.
Ale-Soaked Insights.completetext: I'm glad you checked out the area. Although I'm still skeptical about that fortune teller's cryptic message, it seems like there might be something to it after all.

objectives.objectivessummary: Explore [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] Stables module (1x)

Ale-Soaked Insights.rewards:
150 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Epic Armor|Random Epic Armor]]
350 Experience

Death's Knight.greetingtext: We stand on the brink of our greatest challenge yet, and your courage is needed more than ever. A spectral being wreaks havoc upon the Ruins, leaving destruction in its wake. I believe you are now prepared to face this evil and banish it once and for all.
Death's Knight.completetext: You provided us with a moment's respite from the evil's reign on these lands... Thank you adventurer.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Spectral Knight]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (1x)

Death's Knight.rewards:
150 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Epic Weapon|Random Epic Weapon]]
1 [[Random Epic Armor|Random Epic Armor]]
1000 Experience
50 Affinity

Infectious Inspection.greetingtext: Some kind of infection is spreading rapidly, turning corpses into unspeakable horrors. If you can hunt down a few of these abominations and bring back some samples, our local surgeon might uncover the source of this plague.
Infectious Inspection.completetext: These samples are even more vile than I imagined... but they should be enough to trace the origin of this plague. If I uncover anything further, you'll be the first to know.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Infected Flesh]] (any rarity) (10x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Old Bloody Bandage]] (any rarity) (10x) (Looted/Handled), Kill [[Zombie]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (25x), Kill [[Mummy]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (25x)

Infectious Inspection.rewards:
150 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Epic Weapon|Random Epic Weapon]]
300 Experience
25 Affinity

Monsters and Traps.greetingtext: The samples you brought back are covered in wounds. At first, I assumed they were marks of battle, but their consistent placement and size reveal them to be injuries caused by traps. Traps do not distinguish between adventurers and monsters, yet the creatures show no fear of them. Perhaps dismantling those metal constructs could provide some useful insight.
Monsters and Traps.completetext: Was there nothing unusual? Ah, I see... No, never mind. It would be absurd for me to demand more from you when I haven't even set foot there myself. Still, thanks to you dismantling so many traps, others will have an easier time exploring the Crypts for a while. Thank you.

1.summary: Interact with [[Axe Trap]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (15x)

2.summary: Interact with [[Wall Spike]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (15x)

3.summary: Interact with [[Floor Spikes]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (15x)

Deepening Suspicion.greetingtext: After hearing your report on the traps, a thought crossed my mind. Perhaps it's not just the traps—we might need to search the Crypts itself more thoroughly. After all, that entire place is nothing but a collection of problems. I don't have high expectations, but there's no harm in investigating further.
Deepening Suspicion.completetext: Well done. Of course, I never expected to uncover the Crypts' problems in a single attempt. If that were possible, the cause of this plague would have been solved long ago. Yet, I still can't shake the thought that the tomb itself is the source of the disease. Further investigation will be necessary.

Armor That Stops It All.greetingtext: I heard you fetched some top-quality weapons for the weaponsmith, and what's he planning to do with them, forge a blade that cuts through everything? Ha, then I can't just sit back and let him have all the fun. Adventurer, get me some fine armor pieces too, will you? I'll be the first to craft something that can block anything, yes, anything. Probably. Hopefully. Well... let's just say I'll try my best.
Armor That Stops It All.completetext: Good heavens, these pieces are absolutely brilliant. The finish, especially, so fine and precise. Not a rough edge in sight, and the seams... you'd hardly know where one piece ends and another begins unless you're squinting at it. This is going to be a real lesson for me. Thank you, truly.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch Epic Armor (5x)

Chilling Torch.greetingtext: There's a rumor going around about torches in the Forgotten Castle lighting themselves. Good grief, I can understand a flame going out on its own, sure, but lighting itself? That's just nonsense. The monsters in that place are already more than enough trouble, and now it feels like the castle itself is turning into something out of a nightmare. Could you check on those torches for me? I really, really hope the rumors are just that... rumors.
Chilling Torch.completetext: You went and checked that many torches? I can't thank you enough for going above and beyond. Knowing you looked into it so thoroughly puts my mind at ease. Seems that strange little rumor really was just nonsense after all. Ha, I mean honestly, torches lighting themselves? What a thought!

Blessings Upon You!.greetingtext: Shrines in dungeons are a good friend to any adventurer. Before the Forgotten Castle was swallowed by darkness, visitors used to stop and offer their prayers there as part of everyday life. Nowadays, those shrines are lending their strength to adventurers instead. I hope you make good use of their blessings. Sometimes, they can do more for you than even a sturdy piece of armor.
Blessings Upon You!.completetext: Did the shrine's blessing serve you well? Funny thing is, even folks who don't give much thought to gods and such often start believing once they've felt the power of a shrine's blessing. I've heard some people feel a wave of relief just from spotting one. In a dungeon crawling with enemies, having even a moment's peace like that is no small mercy.

Tongue Twister.greetingtext: The whispers are growing louder, their cadence sharp and desperate, yet they remain beyond our grasp. The dead do not merely wish to be heard—they crave a voice to speak through. To bridge the chasm between our realm and theirs, we must bind the tangible to the ethereal. The tongue of a mimic, that vile creature born of deception, holds the power to weave words across worlds. Seek out one of these lurking horrors, wrest its tongue from its snapping maw, and bring it to me. Only then can we compel the dead to answer.
Tongue Twister.completetext: Ah, the mimic's tongue... slick with malice, yet brimming with potential. Its grotesque vitality pulses in my hands—a perfect conduit. Stand close, adventurer, and witness the veil parting. The afflicted bear runes etched into their flesh, their tongues torn from their mouths. They become husks—empty, their will consumed, and soon, they die, as though they were never truly alive. The dead have spoken. Darkness stirs, adventurer—press on, for the truth will demand its due.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Mimic Tongue]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled)

2 [[Arcane Essence|Uncommon Arcane Essence]]
40 Experience
10 Affinity

Premonitions of the Unknown.greetingtext: The threads of fate twist and knot, veiling the truths that lie beyond our sight. I have caught a faint glimpse of a formless shadow seeking to devour the fragile balance of our world. Yet my visions remain clouded. We need a catalyst to pierce the veil. Deep within the cursed woods, dire wolves roam. Their eyes glimmer with an unnatural light. Bring me one of those eyes. It is a gruesome task, but a necessary one.
Premonitions of the Unknown.completetext: Yes... the eye still gleams, its surface slick with gore. The blood of the beast has yet to dry—good. Its essence still thrums with the arcane. But as I gaze into its depths, the vision remains fractured, like shattered glass. The truth hides still, clawing at the edges of perception. Stay close, adventurer—the unknown awaits us.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Blue Eyeballs]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled)

Voices of the Dead.greetingtext: The eye failed us; its vision clouded... Sight has betrayed me, adventurer, but perhaps sound will not. The voices of the dead echo faintly, yearning to be heard. Deep within the caverns, the giant bats dwell, their ears attuned to the faintest of vibrations, even those that ripple from the beyond. Sever one ear from these shadowed predators—bloodied and raw—and bring it to me. Only then may we align with the spectral murmurs that seek to guide us.
Voices of the Dead.completetext: You've done well. The ear still hums with unnatural resonance, as though it drinks in the very silence around us. Already, I feel the faint touch of voices long silenced, brushing against my thoughts. Yet, their message remains indistinct, a riddle without form. The connection must be strengthened, for the dead demand more than mere listening—they will soon seek communion. May the stars align in our favor.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Giant Bat Ear]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled)

Lights Out.greetingtext: The Forgotten Castle appears to be well lit... well, let's change that. I need you to darken the place, and then once it is done you can use the shadows to aid you in taking care of anyone that intends to do you harm.
Lights Out.completetext: You truly made the shadows come alive in there... and I bet those following you couldn't even see what was coming for them!

They crawl out from those wretched pots that have been sitting in the castle untouched for years! If you destroy enough of those pots, it might send those spiders back into hiding for good.
Webs of Fate.completetext: That will show them! I don't expect to hear any more stories about spiders haunting the halls of that cursed castle... Thanks again for all your efforts.

That's Batty.completetext: Finally! It took you long enough! I hope you kept the wings in one piece. Either way, these should do the trick.

Reflections of the Cursed.greetingtext: Those who foresaw an ill-fated future, peers of mine in their own ways, have sent you to me. They understand that this curse is no simple illness. To break it, one must look beyond the limits of human sight. Bring me the items that allow a glimpse of the truth hidden in the dark. But be warned. Do not look into them too deeply.
Reflections of the Cursed.completetext: Hm. A disturbing sight reveals itself. A guardian bound by magical chains... the one within the frost. It seems to be watching over the vessel that sustains the curse. Adventurer, seek out that creature and uncover the truth it hides. But be wary. This cold conceals far more than you realize.

Frosty Bracelets.greetingtext: Deep in the Icicle Cave lies a creature—not just a beast, but a sentinel tied to the curse's very essence. Those who sent you here—my peers—they suspect its existence, and they are not wrong. But this guardian won't reveal itself easily. Its servants, kobolds twisted by frost magic, will try to stop you. Bring me proof of their presence—primitive bracelets—and uncover what it is that this guardian protects. The truth is within reach, but beware: even knowledge can cut deeper than a blade.
Frosty Bracelets.completetext: So, the kobolds serve a greater purpose—a chain forged in magic and cruelty. The guardian itself is not merely a creature but a force, bound to keep the curse's secrets buried in ice. This aligns with what I've learned from others, though they, too, only grasp pieces of the puzzle. The altar you unearthed—the one marked with sacrifice—resonates with this guardian's power. There is but one step left, adventurer, and it is not one to take lightly.

Blood for the Truth.greetingtext: Now you must take the final step to uncover the secrets of the cursed and their guardian. The Altar of Sacrifice, steeped in dark rituals, is deeply bound to the power of the curse. It must be used to unravel the threads that bind this blight to our world. But remember this. Each time the altar is used, a price will be paid, and its echo will follow you.
Blood for the Truth.completetext: It is done. The altars scream with what you've torn from them—fragments of truth, drenched in blood. I see it clearly now: the curse's origins lie not in flesh or stone, but in forces that reach beyond our understanding. The answers we've uncovered are but whispers of what's to come. You've walked a path few dare tread, but the journey is not over. You must decide if you'll face what lies ahead. The weight of this choice will be yours alone to bear.

Mysterious Vine.greetingtext: There are things that grow only in the harsh reaches of the Blue Maelstrom. Among them, the Saltvine... is not consumed by the mouth, but by the mind. The Tidewalkers have known this truth since ancient days. When they perform their rites, they burn the vine and breathe its smoke. Adventurer, bring me a few strands of it as well. The time has come to kindle a new smoke.
Mysterious Vine.completetext: Mmm... a powerful presence lingers here. The sound of waves, and faint whispers left behind... If your inner eye were open, you too might hear them one day. And now, I must do what I can with this. Seek the paths that have yet to be revealed...

Traces of the Blessing.greetingtext: Surviving the tempestuous sea is no small matter, even for monsters. It is said the Tidewalkers place enchanted necklaces upon the warriors who return from the maelstrom, gifts woven with a shaman's blessing. The warrior protects the shaman, and the shaman shields the tribe. I wonder what truths lie hidden within such a blessing. I will need a few items, worn and weathered by their hands.
Traces of the Blessing.completetext: Hmm... this is a very old kind of magic. Both the necklace and the fragment carry similar traces. This enchantment protects its bearer and strengthens the bond of trust between them. It seems well-suited to bind a tribe together as one. But I will need to study it further before I can say more.

Judge of the Deep.greetingtext: The great white shark is both warden and judge of the sea. If you intend to keep venturing out upon the waters, you must beware of them. These beasts show no mercy to those who trespass into their domain. Strike them down before they sink their teeth into you. I know you can do it. The stars shine upon your path. Now go, adventurer... and bring me the spoils of your victory.
Judge of the Deep.completetext: Well done, adventurer. The warden sleeps, and you have endured the trial of the tides. Now the sea shall remember your name...

Clearing The Way.greetingtext: The late king installed Wall Spikes throughout The Forgotten Castle to keep wanderers away. With a little luck, I believe you could disarm them for safe passage. Just remember, sometimes, you have to create your own luck.
Clearing The Way.completetext: I told you, a little luck can make anything easier! The path may seem clear now, but I can't shake an uneasy feeling about what lies ahead...

Remnants of the Inferno.greetingtext: Demons with wicked souls and their hounds guard every corner of the Inferno... Because of them, we have yet to truly gaze into its depths... To draw even a little closer to the secrets of that dreadful place, I require an item bound to it. Could you bring me something tied to those fiends?
Remnants of the Inferno.completetext: This aura of the demon... For an ordinary soul, merely being near it would bring peril... First, we must cleanse the ominous fluids that shroud it. You have done well.

Source of Evil.greetingtext: The item you brought last time proved most helpful. Yet to examine the depths of the Inferno more closely, I require more wicked relics bound to that place. If you aid me, we shall draw one step closer to uncovering the source of this evil. Clear away all that stands in your path.
Source of Evil.completetext: The aura that emanates from here... it feels like evil itself. I have never encountered anything quite like it before. Yet it may be the only thread by which hope can be reclaimed.

Away With The Green Skins.greetingtext: Ah, my brilliant fleshy! The one who'll take care of my wretched kin! Ha! Me? I was cast out of the caves, abandoned by my own kind! Those brainless green-skins—bah! My tribe thinks I wasted my time making fleshy friends and collecting shinies. They're too stupid to see what truly matters. But me? I'm smart. Hehe. Let's see how they fare without this gobbo! Now, get in that cave and give those traitors a proper beating! Don't worry, fleshy friend—I'll make sure your effort is worth it. Hehehe!
Away With The Green Skins.completetext: Huzzah! Well done, me fleshy friend. Those green skins didn't know what hit ‘em! Ahh, there's trouble brewin'. You see, me kin be stirred up now, all riled and angry. They'll retaliate, mark me words... But with you, my fleshy friend, we boom boom bop 'em and they learns not to mess with Gobbo again!

Gobbo's Favorite Fleshy.greetingtext: No! Something is terribly wrong! After we took down the green-skins, my kin went into a frenzy, and now they've set their sights on your kind! When I was cast out of the caves, my precious fleshies took me in, fed me, and treated me as more than just a greedy goblin—they treated me as a friend. But now... if they're no longer here... No! Get inside that wretched prison and find out what's become of them! Hurry, before it's too late!
Gobbo's Favorite Fleshy.completetext: No, no, no, no... This isn't right. My... my precious fleshy, the one who always protected me, they're gone. Torn apart like they were nothing! Grrr... My kin will pay for this—every last one of them! Their ears will be my trophies! You hear me, fleshy? This gobbo's gonna make them regret ever laying a hand on mine! Kurikuri goblins... Remember my words!

A Goblin's Pride.greetingtext: My kin will regret touching my precious fleshy friend. Now it's time for Gobbo's revenge! Boom boom! See, ears are a goblin's pride, like a badge of honor. So let's smash those stinking green-skins and bring back lots of their ears. We'll stomp their pride into the dirt! Then those goblins will learn never to mess with this Gobbo!
A Goblin's Pride.completetext: Good! Good! Gobbo likes this! You... you might become Gobbo's new precious fleshy... hehe. Look at that. Shiny goblin ears, stacked up nice and pretty. Hehehe, those filthy green-skins don't even know what hit 'em! Their pride? In my hands now. Well done, squishy friend. But this isn't the end. Oh no. My kin still have more to learn... and it'll be rough for them.

Questionable Ingredients.greetingtext: Ahh, fleshy! This time, it's a different kind of job. Look, all that ruckus I caused? Well, now my gambling buddies are all riled up. They think ol' gobbo forgot his roots, trying to fit in with fleshy customs. So, I'm gonna show them! I'll make a special stew—so good, so distracting, they won't care who I gamble with anymore! But to do that, I need the shell of a certain bug—shiny, tough! You bring me that shell, and maybe... just maybe... I'll spill a little something about that woman you're looking for. Something I heard. Hehehe.
Questionable Ingredients.completetext: Aha! That's the one! You did it, fleshy friend! That's the shell I needed for my glorious goblin stew. It's feast time! And as promised, here's a little secret—about the missing girl... She's not what she seems, friend. It's not just that she disappeared—there's something more. But that's all I can say for now. If you want the truth, you'll have to dig deeper yourself. For now, let's eat, and just remember—this gobbo always keeps his promises! Hehehe!

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Bug Shell]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled)

Gobbo's Famous Grubs.greetingtext: Oh! My fleshy friend, listen up! I made a stew with my kin— ‘Gobbos Famous Grubs'! But those stinking green-skins turned their noses up at it, calling it ‘disgusting'! Ha! Fine, now they're gonna taste gobbo's fury at full strength! The worst of ‘em was a goblin mage—he mocked me the most. Find him and teach him a lesson! Oh, and while you're at it, bring me some centipedes and spiders. Then I'll show you how to make a legendary Famous Grubs that no one will ever forget!
Gobbo's Famous Grubs.completetext: Ha! That's more like it! The mage won't be talkin' down on my Famous Grubs stew ever again, no sir! And with the centipedes and spiders you bopped, me next batch's gonna be fit for a gob king! Me kin will eat those words, heh-heh, next time, they'll beg for more! You did good, fleshy—me'll make sure your shiny reward just as special as me stew. Hee-hee!

The Way Out.greetingtext: Ughhh! My stew! I can still hear their laughter ringing in my head! I won't let this go, never! Listen, back when I was exiled, I used a secret path to escape. But that was a long time ago, and I don't know if it's still there. I need you to head into the caves and find that escape route for me. I've got plans, you see? Plans bigger than they can imagine... bigger than my stew... and when it's all over, they'll all say they regret ever crossing Gobbo!
The Way Out.completetext: Yahoo! You found the cursed escape route! We're one step closer now, fleshy friend. Look, Gobbo's been preparing something bigger than they could ever imagine. My kin will pay for every single thing they did to me. Trust Gobbo, fleshy—the time is coming soon... Gobbo's big plan is gonna be way bigger than they expect—whoosh-BOOM! Hehehe!

Easy Pickings.greetingtext: So the cave went rumble and CRASH, huh?! Hahaha! All the fools who mocked me got what they deserved! I knew it! Down there it's blazing hot, bright red water flowing everywhere. Don't touch it, fleshy. Soft meat like yours would burn right up. Those idiots are probably ash by now... so dig through what's left. Might be something useful, hehehe.
Easy Pickings.completetext: So? Find anything good in there? Gonna give some to me? Nah, keep it all. There's something else I want anyway. Come back when you've got time! I'll tell you what I'm really looking for!

An Unforgettable Taste.greetingtext: Before I was exiled, I saw it once while wandering the caves. A lizard completely on fire. Just once. It vanished so fast I thought my eyes fooled me, but they didn't. It left a burning tail behind! Haha! It saw Gobbo and ran off scared. I searched everywhere after that, never saw it again. But I know it's still out there, in the burning lands.
An Unforgettable Taste.completetext: Yes! This is it! I knew you'd bring the right thing, fleshy! Gobbo's eyes never lie! Haha! To think I get to eat this again. Gotta let it cool first. Gobbo's luck never runs out. Huh? You asking if I'm eating it? Of course! Want a bite?

One Very Hot Bite.greetingtext: Fleshy, bring me a few mushrooms from the burning lands. Those shrooms grow by drinking that bright red water, so they're hot. Take one bite and your belly goes up in flames. You'll be groaning for a week. Gobbo's kind hates hot stuff, see. That's why I'm gonna let them have a little taste... secretly!
One Very Hot Bite.completetext: Oho, still nice and warm! But these one's are all black like that. Didn't it burn completely? Even better! I'll slip it right into their stew. Hehe. Eat this, you fools!

A New Delicacy.greetingtext: Hey! You heard about it? That new kind of buzzing bug in the caves! Go squash a few of them for me, will ya? I wanna see if they'll make good stew meat for this gobbo's next recipe! Heh heh... Flying skulls are no good for nothin', but these bugs? Now those are juicy little bundles of nutrition!
A New Delicacy.completetext: Oh, now that's tough. And a lot... bigger than I expected? Hrm, alright, it looks tasty. I like it, I really do! Might be better for something other than stew though... hmm, I'll have to think on it. Meat lump, once it's done, I'll let you know. I might even give you a bite, since it's you.

Shaking Off Misfortune.greetingtext: Fleshling! Wait, don't come any closer. Over there—take a step back! You know it too, right? My luck has been terrible lately. I asked the Fortune teller, and she said I've been cursed by bad energy from someone nearby! And you know what? I only have one friend—you. That means you're the problem. That woman said it—you have to go back to the Ruins. If you want to shake off the misfortune clinging to your back, you have no choice. Again, again, again!
Shaking Off Misfortune.completetext: Alright, friend. You're finally looking a bit better. While you were getting rid of the bad stuff, I managed to score a little something myself. Actually, you ended up tossing out my bad luck too. Heh. So, I suppose I owe you something shiny. Not bad, right?

Reaping Without Effort.greetingtext: Those wretched green-skins stole my shinies! So, they finally understand their value, huh? But laying their filthy hands on mine—that was a very stupid mistake. Hmph, fools should be left to deal with other fools. Fleshling, go steal some junk from the giants in the cave. And leave this behind. What is it? A stinking rag from those foolish green-skins.
Reaping Without Effort.completetext: Well done! I have no idea why they treasured that junk, but now that both are gone, they'll be searching for quite some time. Just thinking about it is amusing! Now, those fools will take out their frustration on those infuriating green-skins for me!

Blowing It All Away.greetingtext: Alright. Last time, the plan was too clever. Looks like the giants just found themselves some new worthless junk to cherish. I completely forgot that those idiots don't actually think. So this time, we're going in loud and brutal. Teach those green-skins a lesson for ignoring me. There are plenty of goblin tribes out there—no one's going to miss a few if they disappear.
Blowing It All Away.completetext: That's right, fleshling! I knew I could count on you! You know what the most obvious truth in the world is? You are useful to this goblin—they are not!

A Strange Omen.greetingtext: Even after the lesson you taught them last time, those wretches are still after my treasure! The same fools who once ignored me over a few shinies! Hey, are you sure you didn't mess something up when dealing with the green-skins? Why are they acting like this? Ugh, I can't stand not knowing! Fleshling! Ransack the entire cave! Turn it upside down and leave nothing untouched!
A Strange Omen.completetext: What? They had a lot of weapons? How many—piled up like a stockpile? Hmm, that is strange. What are they planning...? Thanks, fleshling! I'll take it from here and dig deeper!

Boom Goes the Bad Ones.greetingtext: Me look around, me see it real weird. Real real weird! Bad smell, bad plan! Some goblins, real nasty ones, me old tribe. They say "kick him out!" They say "he not goblin enough!" Pah! Now they bossin' others like they king or something. Why need so many weapons, huh? What for? Big fight? Big boom? Maybe war? Crazy! Crazy like cave bat with fire on tail! Fleshthing, you do it. You smash bad goblins. Break traps too, all of them. Wreck the whole nasty hole!
Boom Goes the Bad Ones.completetext: Good good, you did real good! Perfect! Shame me not see their stupid faces all squished on floor, hah! But anyway, from today, you my most precious fleshthing! Hehehe!

How to Enhance Equipment.greetingtext: Well met! If you're looking to enhance your gear with gemstones, you've come to the right place. There aren't many gemcutters who can handle both cutting and socketing like I can. Keeping my skills sharp takes constant practice. If you don't mind, bring me a few gems. A few flaws won't be a problem.
How to Enhance Equipment.completetext: These aren't bad. Barely good enough for gear of similar quality, perhaps, but they'll do for practice. Thanks. I'll be asking you again from time to time.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Diamond|Common Diamond]] (1x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Ruby|Common Ruby]] (1x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Emerald|Common Emerald]] (1x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Blue Sapphire|Common Blue Sapphire]] (1x) (Looted/Handled)

How to Enhance Equipment.rewards:
50 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Uncommon Armor|Random Uncommon Armor]]
50 Experience

Finer Gem.greetingtext: The quality of a gem has to match the quality of the gear it's set into. Only then can socketing truly bring out its full power. It's a demanding craft, so I'm always working to refine my skills. Bring me some gems today. Just make sure they're of better quality than last time.
Finer Gem.completetext: Very good. This is quite impressive. If you bring your requests to me from now on, I can offer you work of an even higher standard. Well done.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Diamond|Uncommon Diamond]] (1x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Ruby|Uncommon Ruby]] (1x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Emerald|Uncommon Emerald]] (1x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Blue Sapphire|Uncommon Blue Sapphire]] (1x) (Looted/Handled)

Finer Gem.rewards:
75 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Uncommon Armor|Random Uncommon Armor]]
75 Experience

Hands of Precision.greetingtext: Gem socketing is an extremely delicate craft. Lose focus for even a moment, and the whole piece is ruined. Opportunities to work with high-grade gems are rare, which only makes me more particular. That said, do you think you could bring me a few rare gemstones, if possible?
Hands of Precision.completetext: As expected, I knew you wouldn't disappoint me. I can't deny that you've had a significant impact on improving my craft lately. I look forward to working with you again.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Diamond|Rare Diamond]] (2x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Ruby|Rare Ruby]] (2x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Emerald|Rare Emerald]] (2x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Blue Sapphire|Rare Blue Sapphire]] (2x) (Looted/Handled)

Hands of Precision.rewards:
100 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Uncommon Weapon|Random Uncommon Weapon]]
75 Experience

A Short Break.greetingtext: Lately, I've been researching whether there might be ways to work with a wider variety of minerals. I knew it wouldn't be difficult, but it's proving to be no easy task. That said, after concentrating all day, I'm quite hungry. Sorry to ask, but could you bring me something to eat?
A Short Break.completetext: Hm, this is delicious. Where did you get it? ...Somewhere I wouldn't recognize, you say? Well, as long as it tasted good, that's enough for me. I'll be counting on you again next time.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Cobalt Ingot]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Lukewarm Stew]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Red Apple]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled)

A Short Break.rewards:
100 Experience
100 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Rare Armor|Random Rare Armor]]
25 Affinity

Stocking up.greetingtext: Lately, the demand for silver has been rising. It's sought after not only by the upper class, but by adventurers as well. I'd like to stock up a bit before it's too late. My tools are also due for replacement, so if possible, could you bring me some silver along with them? I'd appreciate it.
Stocking up.completetext: Thank you. This should be more than enough for my research. There's still plenty I'll need help with, so please stop by again when you have the time.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Silver Ingot]] (any rarity) (3x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Stone Mortar]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Bronze Scale]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled)

Stocking up.rewards:
125 Experience
125 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Rare Weapon|Random Rare Weapon]]
25 Affinity

Always in Short Supply.greetingtext: Gemcrafting requires more tools than you might expect. The ones I use most wear out quickly. I usually keep spares on hand, but it seems I've run through a few without noticing. I'll let you know what I need, so if possible, please bring several of each. Oh, and don't forget the Rubysilver ingots as well.
Always in Short Supply.completetext: Well done. Thanks to you, my storeroom is much better stocked now. I won't have to worry for a while. Thank you.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Rubysilver Ingot]] (any rarity) (2x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Awl]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Bellows]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled)

Always in Short Supply.rewards:
150 Experience
150 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Rare Armor|Random Rare Armor]]
25 Affinity

Getting Used to Fine Gems.greetingtext: I'm confident in my skills, which is why I never want to ruin a job. When I work with rare, high-grade gems, my nerves get so tight it almost makes my stomach ache. I suppose it's because I'm not used to it yet. There's no choice but to practice more. For now, please bring me high-quality rubies and diamonds.
Getting Used to Fine Gems.completetext: By the stars, look at the light passing through this gem. Truly magnificent. My fingers are itching to start working on it right away. I'm glad I asked you, Adventurer.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Ruby|Epic Ruby]] (3x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Diamond|Epic Diamond]] (3x) (Looted/Handled)

Getting Used to Fine Gems.rewards:
150 Experience
150 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Rare Weapon|Random Rare Weapon]]

Reading the Differences in Gems.greetingtext: Did you know? Every gemstone differs subtly in hardness. Being able to read those differences precisely is one of a gemcutter's key skills. Now that we've worked with rubies and diamonds, it's time to turn our attention to other gems. Sapphires and emeralds would be ideal. I'll leave it to you.
Reading the Differences in Gems.completetext: Truly impressive. With someone like you, Adventurer, I can't help but believe you'll one day bring back even legendary gems. Well done.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Blue Sapphire|Epic Blue Sapphire]] (3x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Emerald|Epic Emerald]] (3x) (Looted/Handled)

Reading the Differences in Gems.rewards:
150 Experience
150 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
4 [[Arcane Essence|Rare Arcane Essence]]

Trying Different Approaches.greetingtext: Adventurer, I've been waiting for you. This time as well, I'd like you to gather some gemstones and minerals for my work. If you happen to come across anything that might be useful for reference in gemcrafting, I'd appreciate it if you could bring that along too. Slightly damaged items are fine, so could you bring several if possible?
Trying Different Approaches.completetext: You've brought everything I asked for, just as promised. With such a range of conditions, there's a great deal to examine. If it weren't for you, Adventurer, I wouldn't have even considered trying so many different approaches. You have my sincere thanks.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Tidestone Ingot]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Broken Glasses]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Blemished Pearl]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled)

Trying Different Approaches.rewards:
200 Experience
200 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Epic Armor|Random Epic Armor]]
25 Affinity

Legendary Gemstones.greetingtext: I feel that I am ready now. Ready to work with legendary gemstones. It will not be an easy task, of course. Still, the experience I have built up should allow me to focus properly on the work. If you are willing to help me, I could not ask for more. Shall we begin with rubies?
Legendary Gemstones.completetext: Such a radiant crimson glow. It truly is different. I know well that chances to work with gemstones like this do not come easily. This is all thanks to you, Adventurer.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Ruby|Legend Ruby]] (5x) (Looted/Handled)

Legendary Gemstones.rewards:
200 Experience
200 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Epic Weapon|Random Epic Weapon]]

Balance and Judgment.greetingtext: Now that I have warmed up with rubies, sapphires would be a good next step. Sapphires are gemstones where subtle balance matters greatly. A single poor judgment can dull their brilliance. That is why they are well suited for this stage. Please bring me sapphires. The more you can provide, the better.
Balance and Judgment.completetext: You have done well. Every sapphire you brought is in excellent condition. Their balance is already well set, so now it comes down to how carefully I handle them. I will proceed with great care.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Blue Sapphire|Legend Blue Sapphire]] (5x) (Looted/Handled)

Balance and Judgment.rewards:
200 Experience
200 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Arcane Essence|Epic Arcane Essence]]

Catching One's Breath.greetingtext: When you work with similar materials for too long, there comes a moment when the hand grows dull. Like now. At times like this, it helps to handle materials of a different nature for a while. Gold and pearls should be suitable. Please bring ones of decent quality.
Catching One's Breath.completetext: I was right to ask you, Adventurer. The materials you brought are in excellent condition. This should be enough to restore my working rhythm.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Gold Ingot]] (any rarity) (5x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Shining Pearl]] (any rarity) (5x) (Looted/Handled)

Catching One's Breath.rewards:
250 Experience
250 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Epic Armor|Random Epic Armor]]
25 Affinity

The Beauty of Restraint.greetingtext: Now that my sense of touch has fully returned, I am ready to resume working with legendary gemstones. This time, I would like you to bring me diamonds. Diamonds demand precise angles and restrained polishing. They will help me refine my skills further.
The Beauty of Restraint.completetext: If crafted properly, there are few gemstones as beautiful as diamonds. They are so hard that there is little need to worry about flaws. Now then, shall we move on to another gemstone?

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Diamond|Legend Diamond]] (5x) (Looted/Handled)

The Beauty of Restraint.rewards:
250 Experience
250 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Epic Armor|Random Epic Armor]]

The Edge of Delicacy.greetingtext: Emeralds are gemstones with an unusually delicate nature among minerals. They may appear hard at first glance, but even a small lapse can leave a mark. That is why delicacy matters more than force when working with them. Could you bring me emeralds this time?
The Edge of Delicacy.completetext: Thank you very much. If it were not for you, I would never have had the chance to work with such a wide range of gemstones of this quality. If you ever have work you wish to entrust to me, please let me know. I will always give it my highest priority.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Emerald|Legend Emerald]] (5x) (Looted/Handled)

The Edge of Delicacy.rewards:
250 Experience
250 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Epic Weapon|Random Epic Weapon]]

A Mysterious Mineral.greetingtext: I heard that obsidian can be obtained. That is truly surprising. Obsidian is so rare that it is difficult even to see it in person. If possible, could you bring me some obsidian? The more, the better. I will also need a few materials that suit it. I will write down what is required. I ask this of you.
A Mysterious Mineral.completetext: Perfect. Opportunities to work with a combination like this are rare. Thanks to you, I can finally attempt a project I had only imagined before. Thank you very much for your help.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Mysterious Potion]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Pocket Watch]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Obsidian Ingot]] (any rarity) (3x) (Looted/Handled)

A Mysterious Mineral.rewards:
300 Experience
300 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
4 [[Arcane Essence|Epic Arcane Essence]]
25 Affinity

order: What It Takes to Become a Master

Daily Mission.greetingtext: I have a strong preference for the capable. Only those kinds of people survive in a place like this. If you're looking for work, I've got plenty. But you'd better deliver results.
Daily Mission.completetext: Not a bad display of skill. You might be ready for something a bit more challenging. I'll be expecting your next visit.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Huntress' Silver Emblem]] (any rarity) (7x) (Looted/Handled)

Weekly Mission.rewards:
1 [[Random Legendary Gems|Random Legendary Gems]]
150 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Huntress' Gold Emblem|Unique Huntress' Gold Emblem]]

Treasure Hunt.greetingtext: A festival wouldn't be complete without a treasure hunt. I've hidden my small, adorable treasures all over the place. They make a very clear sound, so they won't be too hard to find. Just bring me ten. Easy enough, right?
Treasure Hunt.completetext: Good. No more, no less, exactly ten. I'll take them. I'm looking forward to the next time. You didn't think this was the end, did you?

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Krampus' Silver Bell]] (any rarity) (10x) (Looted/Handled)

Treasure Hunt.rewards:
1 [[Krampus' Golden Bell|Unique Krampus' Golden Bell]]
2 [[Arcane Essence|Epic Arcane Essence]]

Rest for the Dead.greetingtext: I'm fair to everyone. But festivals are for the living. The dead still shambling around don't suit this happy season. Would you take care of them for me?
Rest for the Dead.completetext: Alright, well done. They've been wandering around long enough. It's time for them to rest now. For a very long time.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Undead]] (10x)

Rest for the Dead.rewards:
1 [[Krampus' Coin|Unique Krampus' Coin]]
1 [[Random Epic Armor|Random Epic Armor]]

Winter's Chaos.greetingtext: I like those who take action, no matter what. A life spent standing still is boring. So this time, why don't you do what you enjoy? Wreck every dungeon you can, and make it back alive.
Winter's Chaos.completetext: You made it back. The places you passed through have gotten pretty noisy. I like that. Don't stop now.

objectives.objectivessummary: Survive [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (1x), Survive [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/GoblinCave-01-N Goblin Cave] dungeon (1x), Survive [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/IceCavern-01-N Ice Cavern] dungeon (1x), Survive [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/ShipGraveyard-01-N ShipGraveyard] dungeon (1x)

Winter's Chaos.rewards:
3 [[Krampus' Coin|Unique Krampus' Coin]]
1 [[Random Epic Weapon|Random Epic Weapon]]

Krampus' Small Gift.greetingtext: Only those who are truly enjoying this winter's festival can claim my Golden Bell. Bring me one, and I'll give you a small gift in return.
Krampus' Small Gift.completetext: Here you go. A small, charming reward, fitting for a single Golden Bell. If you want something better, try throwing yourself into the festival a little more.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Krampus' Golden Bell]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled)

Krampus' Small Gift.rewards:
1 [[Gold Coin Pouch|Unique Gold Coin Pouch]]
50 Affinity

Krampus' Decent Gift.greetingtext: Only those who are truly enjoying this winter's festival can claim my Golden Bell. Five of them means you did more than just watch, so I'll have a decent reward ready for you.
Krampus' Decent Gift.completetext: Not bad. Here's a reward fitting for five Golden Bells. If you want something more special, you'd better stir up the festival a bit more.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Krampus' Golden Bell]] (any rarity) (5x) (Looted/Handled)

Krampus' Decent Gift.rewards:
1 [[Gold Coin Bag|Unique Gold Coin Bag]]
50 Affinity

Krampus' Special Gift.greetingtext: Only those who are truly enjoying this winter's festival can claim my Golden Bell. Fifteen of them means you've completely taken over the festival, so you can expect something special.
Krampus' Special Gift.completetext: Excellent. You've had a truly remarkable winter. I can vouch for that. I'll be sure to tell Nicholas that this year, there was someone extraordinary.

Cap-tivating Adventures.greetingtext: Greetings, adventurer. I need leather caps—any type will do. They'll be essential for keeping our fellow adventurers warm as they help with the search. Your assistance in gathering these would be greatly appreciated.
Cap-tivating Adventures.completetext: Ah, these are perfect and will be useful in other searches as well. Thank you. She's as adventurous as they come. If you happen to hear anything, please let me know.

Time to Heal.greetingtext: The Ruins have long been a place of both promise and peril. It reminds me of how much my daughter always fancied the statues in that forsaken place. My searches there have yielded little, but perhaps you might discover something new.
Time to Heal.completetext: Accept these tokens of my thanks, and be sure to return soon—I have other tasks that could benefit from your skills.

Campfire Tales.greetingtext: Good to see you again. Those old campsites in the Ruins were once places of respite for us. Travelers and trappers alike knew them well. Search these areas for any hints that might shed light on my daughter's whereabouts.
Campfire Tales.completetext: Your efforts are deeply appreciated. Every day, I grow more weary, but I cannot give up hope. The woodsman has also tirelessly assisted me in this search, and I believe he harbors a special fondness for her. Thank you for persisting.

Oaken Up.greetingtext: I heard you can find all sorts of things inside Oak Chests scattered throughout The Frost Mountain... Would you mind opening a few for me?
Oaken Up.completetext: All of this came from Oak Chests? With spoils like these, it certainly couldn't have been an easy task. You have my thanks for the effort.

Frosty Encounters.greetingtext: The Frost Mountain is crawling with angry little Kobolds and animated Skeletons! If you can help clear the place up I might have something for you... also... bring back proof of your work.
Frosty Encounters.completetext: Ears and bones... Not quite what I had in mind when I said 'proof,' but I suppose they'll do!

Into The Abyss.greetingtext: There's word of an Ice Abyss hidden deep with the depths of The Frost Mountain... Ice Hounds and Frost Sentinels are said to be a common sight down there... take a look for me, will ya?
Into The Abyss.completetext: You really went down there, and lived to tell the tale... I knew you were up for it. By the way... Did you hear anything unusual while you were down there?

1.summary: Kill [[Ice Hound]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/IceCavern-01-N Ice Cavern] dungeon (2x)

Whispers in the Ruins.greetingtext: The last place my daughter went was the Ruins. After all word of her was lost, I searched that place time and again but found nothing. Now I only hope to find even the smallest trace of her, even if it is found among the monsters that roam the Ruins.
Whispers in the Ruins.completetext: You have my thanks. It is disappointing that nothing was found, but in a way it is also a relief. It must mean there is still hope. Even so, the passing of time takes its toll. I can only hope this worn body holds out until I find my daughter.

Dukes of The Dead.greetingtext: Death's lieutenants have corrupted every corner of The Forgotten Castle. Eliminating them will deliver an irreparable blow to their evil. This is just the beginning of cleansing our land.
Dukes of The Dead.completetext: This blow will be noticed by the warlord himself... His presence weakens with every act of justice, bringing us closer to breaking his hold over the Crypts.

Warlord's Bane.greetingtext: You've proven yourself worthy of a task I once deemed unspeakable. The fallen warlord who haunts the Crypts with his deathly grip has revealed himself once more. I cannot say how much longer his presence will endure, now is the time to act!
Warlord's Bane.completetext: It is true! The souls are free, and his corrupted blade lies in pieces! This victory will echo in songs sung at the Tavern for generations! No reward could ever fully honor this deed, but I hope these weapons serve as a worthy start!

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Skeleton Warlord]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (1x)

Warlord's Bane.rewards:
150 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Epic Armor|Random Epic Armor]]
1000 Experience
50 Affinity

Echoes of Memory.greetingtext: Not long ago, a new band of adventurers passed through here. Did you happen to see them? Strangely enough, they were made up just like the group my daughter once traveled with... It brought back memories I hadn't touched in years. I'd like to offer them a small kindness, if I may. They're young still, and it shows in the state of their armor. If you could help me gather some gear and fabric, I would see it properly repaid.
Echoes of Memory.completetext: Thank you. With a bit of mending, these should do well enough. I only hope this helps keep those young ones a little safer. After all, there's nothing more important than returning home alive... to the ones waiting for you. You take care as well, adventurer. Do you understand?

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Sturdy Cloth]] (any rarity) (3x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Spider Silk]] (any rarity) (3x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Warden Outfit|Rare Warden Outfit]] (1x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Troubadour Outfit|Rare Troubadour Outfit]] (1x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Marauder Outfit|Rare Marauder Outfit]] (1x) (Looted/Handled)

Echoes of Memory.rewards:
150 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Epic Weapon|Random Epic Weapon]]
300 Experience
25 Affinity

Faith and Worry.greetingtext: The skeletons in the Forgotten Castle are always a trouble. Especially for the inexperienced, who often panic at their strange, jerking movements and end up badly hurt. I ask that you clear out some of those creatures, for the sake of the ones who have only just begun their journey. But even for someone as seasoned as you, carelessness can be dangerous. Please, adventurer... do not let yourself be harmed.
Faith and Worry.completetext: It brings me true relief to see you return in one piece. I had faith in your skill, of course, but the worry... it never truly leaves me. Now that I've seen you safe, perhaps tonight, I might finally get a bit of sleep.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Undead]] [[Skeleton]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (30x) (single session)

Faith and Worry.rewards:
150 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Epic Armor|Random Epic Armor]]
300 Experience

The Shadow of the Dream.greetingtext: Last night, I had a dreadful dream. My daughter was crying out from deep within the Inferno. I was frozen in place, unable to move a single step, and all I could do was watch as she suffered in the distance. Adventurer, will you go to the Inferno on my behalf? There is something there, I am certain of it. Please, find it. Please, help put an end to my daughter's tears.
The Shadow of the Dream.completetext: This... this was found there? No, no. This is not my daughter. It cannot be. It must not be. No... Please... I cannot believe it. I will not believe it. Please, leave me now. I... I must go to the alchemist. Perhaps he can tell me whose remains these truly are...

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Human Remains]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled)
