150 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Arcane Essence|Epic Arcane Essence]]
1 [[Random Epic Armor|Random Epic Armor]]
1 [[Random Epic Weapon|Random Epic Weapon]]
1000 Experience
50 Affinity

Ominous Movements.greetingtext: The goblins have taken to raiding the merchant caravans passing through these parts, and even the materials I purchased with what little coin I had have vanished in one of their attacks. I can't make sense of what's driving them, nor do I have the strength to fight back myself, but we can't simply let this go. If you find any crates in their cave, break them. Smash every last one you see. They must be made to answer for what they've done.
Ominous Movements.completetext: Thank you for what you've done. They won't be thinking they can raid and plunder without consequence any longer. Still... it troubles me. I've never seen goblins act with such coordination before. This sort of behavior... it's not like them. Not in the old days.

1.summary: Destroy [[Dwarven Small Wooden Crate]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/GoblinCave-01-N Goblin Cave] dungeon (50x)

objectives.objectivessummary: Destroy [[Dwarven Small Wooden Crate]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/GoblinCave-01-N Goblin Cave] dungeon (50x)

Ominous Movements.rewards:
225 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Legendary Armor|Random Legendary Armor]]
500 Experience

Strange Kinship.greetingtext: The most dangerous creatures in the goblin cave are the cyclops and the troll. Folks have long hoped the two would turn on each other, but strangely enough, some sort of bond seems to have formed between them. Friendship between monsters... I can't understand it, and truth be told, I'd rather not. Take them both down, and bring back whatever spoils you find.
Strange Kinship.completetext: Truly remarkable. Your skill only seems to grow with time. You've more than earned a reward befitting your ability. I hope it pleases you.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Cyclops Eye]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Troll's Club]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled)

Strange Kinship.rewards:
225 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Arcane Essence|Legend Arcane Essence]]
500 Experience

Plundering the Plunder.greetingtext: Ever since you shattered all the crates in their cave, the goblins have begun hoarding their loot in golden chests, or so I've heard. Their senseless raids haven't stopped either. Adventurer, this time I ask you to target the golden chests. Take as many as you can.
Plundering the Plunder.completetext: The goblins I knew used to care for little more than food. They never fought to gather weapons or trinkets like they do now. It's strange... deeply so. I fear what might lie at the end of this unnatural behavior.

1.summary: Interact with [[Golden Chest]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/GoblinCave-01-N Goblin Cave] dungeon (20x)

objectives.objectivessummary: Interact with [[Golden Chest]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/GoblinCave-01-N Goblin Cave] dungeon (20x)

Plundering the Plunder.rewards:
300 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Legendary Armor|Random Legendary Armor]]
1000 Experience

Materials for Truth.greetingtext: The alchemist says... that to confirm whether those remains are truly my daughter, a certain material is required. I do not wish to know, and yet... the thought that I must will not leave me. But... I cannot bring myself to take that step. Would you gather what is needed in my stead?
Materials for Truth.completetext: Thank you. If I bring this to the alchemist... I will know soon enough. Whatever the result may be, I believe it is time I faced it.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Demon Blood]] (any rarity) (3x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Lifeleaf]] (any rarity) (5x) (Looted/Handled)

Materials for Truth.rewards:
500 Experience
225 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Legendary Armor|Random Legendary Armor]]

Revealed Truth.greetingtext: The alchemist says the same trace found on her belongings was present in the remains as well. Then... it is likely that they truly are my daughter's... I must know what did this to her. There is something needed to uncover the truth. I ask this of you.
Revealed Truth.completetext: You have my deepest thanks. I will return to the alchemist. If I stop here, I will never know rest. As long as this old body endures, I will see it through to the end.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Enchanted Eye]] (any rarity) (3x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Glowing Orange Eye]] (any rarity) (2x) (Looted/Handled)

Revealed Truth.rewards:
500 Experience
225 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
4 [[Arcane Essence|Legend Arcane Essence]]

For Her.greetingtext: The alchemist has named the most likely culprit. Hunters that roam the deep of the Inferno. Creatures driven by madness, preying on both man and their own kind without distinction. ...Was my daughter taken as their prey as well... Adventurer, find them and put an end to them.
For Her.completetext: I am truly grateful. I owe you a debt I cannot repay. I suppose... it is time I let my daughter go. But... I will need a little more time.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Hell Hunter]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (5x)

For Her.rewards:
1000 Experience
300 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Legendary Armor|Random Legendary Armor]]

The Land in Flames.greetingtext: Through our misguided choices, the calamity of fire that lay dormant, Ignir, has awakened. I barely managed to escape that place, but many of my kin are still held there, bound by his control. To save them, I will need your help, Adventurer. But before I ask you to take on such danger, I must be certain that this is something you can endure.
The Land in Flames.completetext: You've returned safely. That is a relief. Seeing you come back unharmed gives me a small measure of hope.

objectives.objectivessummary: Survive [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/GoblinCave-01-N Goblin Cave] dungeon (1x)

The Land in Flames.rewards:
50 Experience
75 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Uncommon Weapon|Random Uncommon Weapon]]

Beasts in the Flames.greetingtext: Ignir has twisted not only my kin, but also the beasts of that land. They were once animals we raised, but now they wander through the flames, stripped of reason and driven to rage. If left unchecked, they will become a greater threat. Put them down and bring back what remains as proof.
Beasts in the Flames.completetext: Well done. They were once companions who shared in our quiet daily lives. It seems so much was lost because of our misguided choices.

1.summary: Kill [[Flame Boar]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/GoblinCave-01-N Goblin Cave] dungeon (5x)

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Flame Boar]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/GoblinCave-01-N Goblin Cave] dungeon (5x), Fetch [[Cracked Tusk]] (any rarity) (3x) (Looted/Handled)

Beasts in the Flames.rewards:
250 Experience
125 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Rare Armor|Random Rare Armor]]

Unbelievable News.greetingtext: Those who recently returned from my homeland say they found the bodies of our kin there. But when I escaped that place, they were still alive, though under control. I do not know what happened in the time between. Adventurer, please examine the condition of the fallen and report back to me.
Unbelievable News.completetext: I can hardly believe some of the bodies are already reduced to bone. It seems Ignir is corrupting everything in that place. We must stop him before it is too late.

1.summary: Interact with [[Fallen Dwarf]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/GoblinCave-01-N Goblin Cave] dungeon (7x)

objectives.objectivessummary: Interact with [[Fallen Dwarf]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/GoblinCave-01-N Goblin Cave] dungeon (7x)

Unbelievable News.rewards:
250 Experience
125 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Rare Weapon|Random Rare Weapon]]

Servant of Fire.greetingtext: My kin who have been enthralled continue to dig without rest. As a result, the lava fields have spread, and a lava golem has emerged. That golem is, for all intents and purposes, a thrall of Ignir. As Ignir's influence grows, the golem's strength will grow with it. We must bring that creature down before it is too late.
Servant of Fire.completetext: You have done well. Thanks to you, Ignir's influence has been pushed back, if only for a short while. But it will not last. He can always create new servants. We must now prepare for the next step.

1.summary: Kill [[Lava Golem]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/GoblinCave-01-N Goblin Cave] dungeon (1x)

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Lava Golem]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/GoblinCave-01-N Goblin Cave] dungeon (1x)

Servant of Fire.rewards:
500 Experience
125 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Rare Armor|Random Rare Armor]]
1 [[Random Rare Weapon|Random Rare Weapon]]

To find an opening.greetingtext: Before we confront Ignir, it would be wise to assess his current state. Please investigate the area around the great forge. Observe the condition of the flames and the flow of the lava, then report back. As Ignir is devoting his strength to expanding his control, he cannot be maintaining perfect command over everything. We must find that opening.
To find an opening.completetext: The instability in the flow of fire is an important sign. It likely means that Ignir's power is being spread thin as he expands his dominion. We must act quickly.

1.summary: Explore [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/GoblinCave-01-N Goblin Cave] Burning Court module (1x)

objectives.objectivessummary: Explore [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/GoblinCave-01-N Goblin Cave] Burning Court module (1x)

To find an opening.rewards:
300 Experience
150 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Epic Armor|Random Epic Armor]]

Final Preparations.greetingtext: Fire spirits and elementals are beings that aid Ignir in restoring his strength. They act as conduits, gathering the power of fire and delivering it to him. If left alone, the scattered power will quickly come together again. To slow that process, even if only a little, we must eliminate them.
Final Preparations.completetext: Well done. We have now made all the preparations we can. With those who aid Ignir lying low, we must not let this opportunity slip away. When you are ready, please come to me.

1.summary: Kill [[Fire Spirit]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/GoblinCave-01-N Goblin Cave] dungeon (15x)

2.summary: Kill [[Fire Elemental]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/GoblinCave-01-N Goblin Cave] dungeon (15x)

Final Preparations.rewards:
350 Experience
150 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Epic Weapon|Random Epic Weapon]]
1 [[Random Epic Armor|Random Epic Armor]]

The Incomplete Colossus.greetingtext: According to legend, a fully awakened Ignir is a being made solely of living lava. But due to the seal breaking incompletely, he now bears the form of a colossus, solid stone entwined with molten fire. We must stop him before he regains his true form. Adventurer, please put an end to him.
The Incomplete Colossus.completetext: This will not be the end. Spirits like Ignir do not fade so easily. He is likely hiding within the lava, waiting for another chance. Before he can regain his strength, I will seek a way to seal him completely. Thank you, truly, for all the help you have given us.

1.summary: Kill [[Fire Colossus]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/GoblinCave-01-N Goblin Cave] dungeon (1x)

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Fire Colossus]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/GoblinCave-01-N Goblin Cave] dungeon (1x)

The Incomplete Colossus.rewards:
1000 Experience
200 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Epic Weapon|Random Epic Weapon]]
1 [[Random Epic Armor|Random Epic Armor]]
2 [[Arcane Essence|Epic Arcane Essence]]

order: The Fire That Will Not End

For a Sturdy Hull.greetingtext: Well met, adventurer. Might I ask for your aid in repairing this old ship? With a bit of work, she could sail again as a proper merchant vessel. Should you choose to help, you'll be fairly rewarded. For now, I'll need stout timber, strong enough to hold against the sea's fury.
For a Sturdy Hull.completetext: This is good quality. With timber this sturdy, it shouldn't break easily. I'll begin repairs on the deck and hull with what you've brought. There's still more work to be done, so I may ask for your help again soon.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Billet]] (any rarity) (2x), Fetch [[Bavin]] (any rarity) (2x)

For a Sturdy Hull.rewards:
50 Experience
50 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Uncommon Armor|Random Uncommon Armor]]
3 [[Potion of Healing|Common Potion of Healing]]
3 [[Bandage|Common Bandage]]
1 [[Aquaglow Lantern|Uncommon Aquaglow Lantern]]

The Cloth That Wraps the Wind.greetingtext: I bought this ship with the coin I earned working as a merchant navigator. I would have liked a better vessel, but this is what I could afford. Sometimes, you simply make do with what you have. Now I need a new sail. If the fabric is weak, it won't catch the wind properly. Please bring me sturdy cloth and a set of sewing tools.
The Cloth That Wraps the Wind.completetext: The fabric is thick and sturdy. It should hold its own out on the sea. Just a bit more work and she'll be ready. I can't wait to see the sails catch the wind.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Sturdy Cloth]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Pincushion]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled)

The Cloth That Wraps the Wind.rewards:
50 Experience
50 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Trap Disarming Kit|Uncommon Trap Disarming Kit]]
1 [[Ale|Common Ale]]
3 [[Potion of Healing|Common Potion of Healing]]

The Knot That Binds All.greetingtext: Once you've been aboard a ship, you'll come to see just how many ropes are used throughout. They wear down quickly, and constant maintenance is a part of life at sea. Bring me several ropes. It's all right if some are worn. I can trim away the bad sections and salvage the rest. As long as the critical lines are secured, we'll be ready to depart.
The Knot That Binds All.completetext: Thank you, adventurer. Thanks to you, my ship feels reborn. Guiding a strong vessel swiftly and safely is what I do best. I may well be the one who's sailed near the Blue Maelstrom more than anyone alive. Now, at last, I can return to the sea.
The Knot That Binds All.requiredquest: The Cloth That Wraps the Wind

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Old Rope]] (any rarity) (3x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Sturdy Rope]] (any rarity) (3x) (Looted/Handled)

The Knot That Binds All.rewards:
75 Experience
75 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Uncommon Weapon|Random Uncommon Weapon]]
1 [[Random Uncommon Armor|Random Uncommon Armor]]

order: The Cloth That Wraps the Wind

Shadow of the Past.greetingtext: The pirates roaming the Ship Graveyard belong to the infamous Black Despair crew. They've plundered countless vessels and left a trail of death behind them. They're the reason I walked away from my life as a merchant navigator. I cannot forgive them. Adventurer, I ask you to see that they are dealt with.
Shadow of the Past.completetext: You've done well. I can't forget what happened that day, but it feels as though a small part of the debt has been repaid. Still, this is only the beginning. For now, I simply want to thank you.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Pirate Swordman]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/ShipGraveyard-01-N ShipGraveyard] dungeon (3x), Kill [[Pirate Bowman]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/ShipGraveyard-01-N ShipGraveyard] dungeon (3x)

Shadow of the Past.rewards:
75 Experience
75 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Arcane Essence|Uncommon Arcane Essence]]

Coffins Beneath the Waves.greetingtext: Have you seen the large, shell-like structures scattered across the Ship Graveyard? Among sailors, they're known as mermaid coffins, though no one truly knows what lies within. My brother once studied them. It doesn't matter much anymore, but still... I'd like to know the truth, if only for his sake. Please, take a look inside one of those coffins.
Coffins Beneath the Waves.completetext: There were all kinds of things inside. Likely remnants from sunken ships. In a way, I suppose you could call them keepsakes, traces of those who never made it back. Thank you for taking the time to look.

1.summary: Interact with [[Mermaid Coffin]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/ShipGraveyard-01-N ShipGraveyard] dungeon (5x)

objectives.objectivessummary: Interact with [[Mermaid Coffin]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/ShipGraveyard-01-N ShipGraveyard] dungeon (5x)

Coffins Beneath the Waves.rewards:
100 Experience
100 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Uncommon Weapon|Random Uncommon Weapon]]

Trial of Worth.greetingtext: Each of us has our strengths. I know how to command a ship, but I'm no fighter. That is why I've been searching for someone who could stand in my place, someone skilled in both battle and survival. Someone who could help me see my revenge through. Adventurer, will you show me what you're capable of?
Trial of Worth.completetext: Thank you for accepting, even though it was no simple request. I swore I would do whatever it takes to avenge my fallen crew, no matter how difficult the path. And to do that, I need the help of someone like you. I'll be counting on you from here on.

objectives.objectivessummary: Survive [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/ShipGraveyard-01-N ShipGraveyard] dungeon (2x)

Trial of Worth.rewards:
100 Experience
100 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Uncommon Weapon|Random Uncommon Weapon]]
2 [[Arcane Essence|Uncommon Arcane Essence]]
1 [[Random Uncommon Armor|Random Uncommon Armor]]

Brawler of the Sea.greetingtext: The Tidewalkers are a troublesome foe. Once they spot an enemy, they attack without hesitation, no matter the circumstance. They're especially aggressive when accompanied by one of their shamans, so caution is advised. A scouting party I sent out recently has run into serious trouble because of them. I could use your help. Subdue them, if you can.
Brawler of the Sea.completetext: Well done. Thanks to you, our scouting efforts should go more smoothly for a while. All I can do now is hope they find my brother's map. It was taken when he was captured by the pirates, so it must be somewhere in the Ship Graveyard.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Tidewalker Clubfighter]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/ShipGraveyard-01-N ShipGraveyard] dungeon (5x), Kill [[Tidewalker Boomerang]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/ShipGraveyard-01-N ShipGraveyard] dungeon (5x), Kill [[Tidewalker Spearer]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/ShipGraveyard-01-N ShipGraveyard] dungeon (3x)

Brawler of the Sea.rewards:
100 Experience
125 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Arcane Essence|Rare Arcane Essence]]

Pieces of a Broken Dream.greetingtext: During the last search, we were fortunate enough to recover a portion of the map I've been looking for. But it isn't enough. We need the remaining pieces. With both the monsters and the pirates still prowling that place, continuing the search is proving too difficult. Adventurer, would you help me recover the rest of the map? I'm asking for your help.
Pieces of a Broken Dream.completetext: This map is a keepsake filled with my brother's passion. He was an archaeologist, and together we searched for signs of ancient ruins and forgotten sea routes. We once promised to set sail and explore them, should we ever find a promising lead. I intend to carry on that dream, even if I must do it alone. This map will be the beginning.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Old Nautical Chart Fragment]] (any rarity) (3x)

Pieces of a Broken Dream.rewards:
100 Experience
125 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Rare Armor|Random Rare Armor]]

Where the Map Points.greetingtext: Adventurer, I have a favor to ask. While examining my brother's map, I found a marked location deeper within the Ship Graveyard. It's labeled for investigation, though I don't know what he hoped to find there. Could you look into it for me? If anything stands out, please let me know.
Where the Map Points.completetext: A fortress-like structure, you say? Then it must have been built by human hands. How intriguing. If my brother were still alive, he would have been thrilled by such a discovery. I'm only a navigator, so I can't say much more, but even I can tell this is something worth studying. I'll try to find an archaeologist who might be interested. For my brother's sake.

objectives.objectivessummary: Explore [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/ShipGraveyard-01-N ShipGraveyard] Pirate Prison module (1x)

Where the Map Points.rewards:
150 Experience
150 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Rare Weapon|Random Rare Weapon]]

An Unforgotten Memory.greetingtext: When my ship was taken by pirates... I was lucky to survive, but the others weren't. Most were thrown into the sea, and that was the last I saw of them. The waters near the Blue Maelstrom are full of man-eating fish. Adventurer, please deal with them. And if you find any items that might have belonged to sailors, bring them to me. I want to know if they were people I once knew.
An Unforgotten Memory.completetext: This... this is my crewmate's journal. He was fond of keeping records, always curious, always jotting down everything he learned. I never thought I'd see this again. Thank you, adventurer. Truly.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Moray Eel]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/ShipGraveyard-01-N ShipGraveyard] dungeon (10x), Kill [[Sea Piranha]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/ShipGraveyard-01-N ShipGraveyard] dungeon (10x), Fetch [[Sailor's Journal]] (any rarity) (1x)

An Unforgotten Memory.rewards:
300 Experience
150 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Epic Armor|Random Epic Armor]]

A Wish Etched in Ink.greetingtext: While reading through my crewmate's journal, I found something interesting. It speaks of glowing pearls and unusually shaped coral near the Blue Maelstrom. It seems he truly wished to see them with his own eyes. Adventurer, would you help me find them? I'd like to fulfill his wish, even if it's a little late.
A Wish Etched in Ink.completetext: The pearl truly holds a glow within it. And the coral... it's thicker, with a strange texture unlike any I've seen. I only wish he could have seen them himself. I'll deliver these to his family, along with the journal he left behind.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Coral Fragment]] (any rarity) (3x), Fetch [[Shining Pearl]] (any rarity) (1x)

A Wish Etched in Ink.rewards:
300 Experience
150 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Epic Weapon|Random Epic Weapon]]

The Path Beyond the Map.greetingtext: My brother's research notes speak of a great river that once existed and a guardian said to dwell within it. Most of it is speculation, but the description of the guardian is hard to ignore. A beast with massive jaws, a vertical eye, and thick, leathery skin... It might be connected to the Crocodilian. Hunt them down and bring me one of their eyes. There's something I need to confirm.
The Path Beyond the Map.completetext: My ancient compass points to places connected to the item placed upon it. If we set the Crocodilian eye here, it should respond... Hmm. It's pointing to a land abandoned long ago. I've heard the river there dried up, the earth turned foul, and nothing lives there now. This warrants investigation.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Crocodilian]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/ShipGraveyard-01-N ShipGraveyard] dungeon (1x), Fetch [[Crocodilian Eyeball]] (any rarity) (1x)

The Path Beyond the Map.rewards:
500 Experience
200 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Epic Weapon|Random Epic Weapon]]
1 [[Random Epic Armor|Random Epic Armor]]
2 [[Arcane Essence|Epic Arcane Essence]]

The Pirate's Refuge.greetingtext: We've scouted much of the Ship Graveyard, but the area where the pirates gather is beyond what our search parties can handle. Adventurer, I need you to investigate the places they frequent. We must know what kind of weapons they're hiding and whether they're preparing for something. They're not to be underestimated, so be careful.
The Pirate's Refuge.completetext: Thank you for checking. It seems their weapons aren't in as good a condition as I feared, and they don't appear to be hiding much either. What I need now is someone with the skill to surpass them. Someone like you, adventurer.

objectives.objectivessummary: Explore [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/ShipGraveyard-01-N ShipGraveyard] Hanging Ship module (1x), Explore [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/ShipGraveyard-01-N ShipGraveyard] Floating Village module (1x), Explore [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/ShipGraveyard-01-N ShipGraveyard] Circle Island module (1x), Explore [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/ShipGraveyard-01-N ShipGraveyard] Rock Island module (1x)

The Pirate's Refuge.rewards:
400 Experience
200 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Legendary Weapon|Random Legendary Weapon]]

The Price of Loyalty.greetingtext: The Black Despair pirates are blindly loyal to their captain. They've long claimed dominion over these seas, plundering and burning countless ships. Now it's time they were repaid in kind.
The Price of Loyalty.completetext: Well done. They seemed unstoppable, and yet... here we are. Victory, at last. Now, only one step remains. Adventurer, I need your strength one final time.

1.summary: Kill [[Pirate Axe Thrower]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/ShipGraveyard-01-N ShipGraveyard] dungeon (10x)

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Pirate Axe Thrower]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/ShipGraveyard-01-N ShipGraveyard] dungeon (10x), Kill [[Pirate Bowman]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/ShipGraveyard-01-N ShipGraveyard] dungeon (20x), Kill [[Pirate Swordman]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/ShipGraveyard-01-N ShipGraveyard] dungeon (20x)

The Price of Loyalty.rewards:
400 Experience
200 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Legendary Armor|Random Legendary Armor]]

Despair's End.greetingtext: There isn't a sailor alive who hasn't heard of Captain Bladehand. That wretched pirate has long been a scar buried deep within me. Ever since the day I survived his attack, I've waited for the chance to take revenge. Now, everything is in place. Adventurer, I ask you to end him.
Despair's End.completetext: It's truly over. I hope this means my fallen crewmates can finally rest in peace. And as for me... perhaps it's time I started living for myself. Thank you, truly.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Bladehand]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/ShipGraveyard-01-N ShipGraveyard] dungeon (1x)

1000 Experience
300 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Legendary Weapon|Random Legendary Weapon]]
1 [[Random Legendary Armor|Random Legendary Armor]]
2 [[Arcane Essence|Legend Arcane Essence]]

order: In Search of the Echoes of the Past

Awoken Without a Name.greetingtext: I remember not who I am... what deeds I once performed... nor even the reason for my death... There is but one thing I recall... that I am searching for something... That yearning alone stirred me from my slumber... Perhaps, if the coffins within the catacombs were opened... some trace may yet remain... Adventurer... would you help me recover the memories I have lost...?
Awoken Without a Name.completetext: There were no clear signs, I see... but it matters not... While I waited for your return... a memory came to me... I was there, in that castle... I remember writing something... and watching someone die... so many... so many deaths...

objectives.objectivessummary: Interact with [[Casket]] (10x)

Awoken Without a Name.rewards:
9 [[Potion of Healing|Common Potion of Healing]]
9 [[Potion of Protection|Common Potion of Protection]]
9 [[Potion of Invisibility|Common Potion of Invisibility]]
100 Experience
50 Affinity

Where the Dead Whisper.greetingtext: Adventurer... I ask thee to journey to the place where others like me have begun to stir... Seek out any among them who, like myself, may have recovered fragments of their memory... If such a one exists, you may be able to speak with them... and perhaps then I shall learn what it is I am truly seeking...
Where the Dead Whisper.completetext: You say they were all mindless monsters... No... they were not monsters... They too were once living people... What led them to death... was magic... my magic... our magic... Ah... I have sinned...!

objectives.objectivessummary: Explore [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] Abandoned Sanctuary module (1x)

Where the Dead Whisper.rewards:
15 [[Cursed Bandage|Unique Cursed Bandage]]
2 [[Arcane Essence|Uncommon Arcane Essence]]
250 Experience
50 Affinity

What I Truly Desired.greetingtext: ...What is it that I so desperately longed for... Was it treasure... or jewels... such things as these... Could it be that mere filthy greed... was what led so many to their deaths by my hand... Gods, let it not be so... Adventurer... bring me the gems... If I see them with my own eyes, perhaps I shall know the truth...
What I Truly Desired.completetext: No... it wasn't that... What I seek is not treasure... It was... yes, something terrible... something written down... Ah... my head... it feels as if it will shatter... This pain, it's too much... I cannot think... Please... make it stop... make it stop...

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Diamond|Rare Diamond]] (2x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Ruby|Rare Ruby]] (2x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Emerald|Rare Emerald]] (2x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Blue Sapphire|Rare Blue Sapphire]] (2x) (Looted/Handled)

What I Truly Desired.rewards:
50 [[Cursed Bandage|Unique Cursed Bandage]]
2 [[Arcane Essence|Rare Arcane Essence]]
1 [[Random Rare Armor|Random Rare Armor]]
1 [[Random Rare Weapon|Random Rare Weapon]]
250 Experience
50 Affinity

The Scroll That Should Not Be.greetingtext: At last, I remember... What I seek is a scroll... one that holds knowledge most dangerous... It was used to draw out the essence of darkness... using people... leading them, in the end, to death... That scroll is unlike any other... it has not faded, nor has it decayed... and it still lies somewhere within the castle... Adventurer, I beg you... please, find it for me...
The Scroll That Should Not Be.completetext: Yes... this is it... At last, all has returned to me... Adventurer, I was a sorcerer of the castle... The experiments were ordered by the court mage... I believed it was a work to preserve life... but the truth was far darker... When I learned what it truly was, I tried to destroy the scroll... but I failed... and I too became one of the subjects... Now that I have it again, I can finally put it to rest... and perhaps, at last, find peace... Thank you, adventurer...

1.fetch: [[Scroll of Forgotten Knowledge|Epic Scroll of Forgotten Knowledge]]
1.summary: Fetch [[Scroll of Forgotten Knowledge|Epic Scroll of Forgotten Knowledge]] (1x) (Looted/Handled)

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Scroll of Forgotten Knowledge|Epic Scroll of Forgotten Knowledge]] (1x) (Looted/Handled)

order: The Scroll That Should Not Be

Bone and Blood.greetingtext: Greetings, adventurer. I've got a bone to pick with you. Your constant skirmishes have left some of my companions somewhat disassembled. After enduring a year of relentless battles, I'm taking a well-deserved break and seeking a capable adventurer like you to aid us.
Bone and Blood.completetext: While we're on the subject of bones, I've amusedly listened to countless theories about our bleeding—from magical explanations to scientific fantasies. But between us? I suspect the powers that control our world simply find it visually appealing, delightfully grim.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Bone]] (any rarity) (30x) (Looted/Handled)

Bone and Blood.rewards:
9 [[Potion of Healing|Rare Potion of Healing]]
9 [[Potion of Invisibility|Rare Potion of Invisibility]]
9 [[Potion of Protection|Rare Potion of Protection]]
100 Experience

Graveyard Shifts.greetingtext: Ever wonder what a skeleton's day job is like? Try surviving these places. It's not all rattling bones and eerie moans. Try surviving where we reign; it might just chill your marrow.
Graveyard Shifts.completetext: You've survived! That's more than most of my acquaintances can say.

objectives.objectivessummary: Survive [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/GoblinCave-01-N Goblin Cave] dungeon (3x), Survive [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (3x), Survive [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/IceCavern-01-N Ice Cavern] dungeon (3x)

Graveyard Shifts.rewards:
3 [[Campfire Kit|Rare Campfire Kit]]
3 [[Surgical Kit|Rare Surgical Kit]]
6 [[Bandage|Rare Bandage]]
300 Experience

Etched in Bone.greetingtext: Lately, I've heard whispers that my comrades are falling far too easily. As proud skeletons, we must show we're not just hollow-boned fools. Bring me their skulls. As many as you can. I'll make sure the lesson sticks.
Etched in Bone.completetext: Good! Very good. Our skeletons will come back stronger, after some properly bone-deep training. And it's all thanks to you. If anything else comes up, we'll handle it next year. For now, let's enjoy the celebration.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Intact Skull]] (any rarity) (10x)

Etched in Bone.rewards:
1000 Experience
1 [[Gold Coin Bag|Unique Gold Coin Bag]]

The Squire's Request.greetingtext: Hello, adventurer. Um... could I ask you for a small favor? I'm helping out adventurers here for now, but it's always been my dream to go on a real adventure myself someday. My uncle, the Tavern Master, keeps saying it's too soon and won't let me go. But I just know I could do well, if I had some decent gear. If you could find me a few pieces... would you, maybe? Please?
The Squire's Request.completetext: Thank you so much! The truth is... I'm an orphan. If my uncle hadn't taken me in, I don't know where I'd be now. I'm truly grateful for everything he's done, I really am. But... sometimes I think he's a bit overprotective. Still, I suppose it's up to me to prove myself first. If I can do that, then even he won't be able to say no.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch Common Armor (1x), Fetch Common Weapon (1x)

The Squire's Request.rewards:
30 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Uncommon Armor|Random Uncommon Armor]]
25 Experience

The Squire's Curiosity.greetingtext: I know it's just a Ruins now, but it used to be a grand castle, didn't it? It's become a lair for monsters these days... but I've heard that many of the old statues are still standing, hidden throughout the place. I was wondering... could you look for them in my stead? I'm not quite ready to go there myself, not yet. Please... would you do that for me?
The Squire's Curiosity.completetext: Oh no... So most of the statues are broken? That's really sad to hear. Just imagining them shattered like that... it makes my heart ache a little. I wish we could bring some of the pieces back. But I suppose that would be difficult, wouldn't it? They're probably far too heavy... What a shame.

objectives.objectivessummary: Explore [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] Tower Bridge module (1x)

The Squire's Curiosity.rewards:
30 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Uncommon Weapon|Random Uncommon Weapon]]
25 Experience

The Squire's Compassion.greetingtext: They say the Forgotten Castle is haunted by skeletons that walk on their own. What kind of terrible curse could force them to rise, even in death, never knowing rest? Whenever I talk like this, people tell me not to dwell on such things... but I can't help it. I think it's all so very sad. Please, adventurer, help those poor souls find peace.
The Squire's Compassion.completetext: I've never met someone as kind as you, adventurer. Especially someone who actually listens to what I say, instead of just brushing it off. I'll do my best from now on to be of real help to you, too!

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Skeleton Guardman]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (1x), Kill [[Skeleton Footman]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (1x), Kill [[Skeleton Archer]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (1x)

The Squire's Compassion.rewards:
30 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Arcane Essence|Uncommon Arcane Essence]]
25 Experience

The Squire's Failure.greetingtext: I went to the Forgotten Castle on my own not long ago... but I barely made it past the entrance before some beast started chasing me. I ran for my life and somehow got away, but I lost my weapon and my armor's all torn to bits. Becoming an adventurer... it's not quite how I imagined. I'd go back and try again, but I don't have anything to wear or wield anymore. Adventurer, could you help me find new gear? Something a little better this time... please?
The Squire's Failure.completetext: Thank you so much! I think I may have taken it all too lightly. I really believed I could handle it on my own... but now I see I wasn't ready. Next time, I'm going to try finding a companion or two. If we go together, maybe we'll make it farther than just the entrance.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch Uncommon Armor (1x), Fetch Uncommon Weapon (1x)

The Squire's Failure.rewards:
50 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Rare Armor|Random Rare Armor]]
75 Experience

The Squire's Daydream.greetingtext: Adventurer, have you ever been to Frost Mountain? Just imagining a place where it's always winter feels like something out of a dream. Especially the ice caves. I'm sure they're filled with crystal-clear ice, glittering like gemstones. And the ceiling must be lined with huge icicles, hanging down like frozen spears. It must be such a breathtaking sight! If you ever go there, would you tell me what it was like? If anything stands out, something truly magical, please promise you'll share it with me!
The Squire's Daydream.completetext: Wow, the ceiling's really that high? I can hardly imagine it! And if there's even a bridge inside... it must be huge! The whole floor made of ice too? I'd probably slip the moment I stepped in. Still... I've made up my mind! My next adventure will be to Frost Mountain! I want to see it all with my own eyes!

objectives.objectivessummary: Explore [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/IceCavern-01-N Ice Cavern] Altar module (1x), Explore [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/IceCavern-01-N Ice Cavern] Guardpost module (1x)

The Squire's Daydream.rewards:
50 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Rare Weapon|Random Rare Weapon]]
75 Experience

The Squire's Reality.greetingtext: Adventurer... the skeletons were nothing like I imagined. I thought I would feel sorry for them, but I didn't. They were terrifying. I only saw them from afar, but I was so scared I couldn't even move. And the ones in Frost Mountain were even worse. Their bones were all frozen blue, like they had been trapped in ice for ages. It was awful. Please, adventurer, can you take care of them? I don't think I'll be able to sleep until they're gone.
The Squire's Reality.completetext: I'm so sick of skeletons now. I don't ever want to see those creaky, clattering things again... Thank you, adventurer. I think I can finally get a good night's sleep with both eyes closed. From now on, you can leave all your preparations to me. I'll make sure everything is packed just right, extra carefully, just for you!

1.summary: Kill [[Frost Skeleton Guardman]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/IceCavern-01-N Ice Cavern] dungeon (5x)

The Squire's Sorrow.greetingtext: The Frost Mountain adventure was a complete disaster. I barely made it out alive, and only thanks to the companions who were with me. I lost all my gear too... the ones you worked so hard to find for me. I'm such a fool... You don't have to say anything to comfort me. My uncle was right. Maybe someone like me just isn't meant to be an adventurer... What? You want to help me get new equipment again? No, please, don't trouble yourself because of me. Adventurer? Adventurer, wait!
The Squire's Sorrow.completetext: Such a wonderful gift... There is no one else like you in the whole world, adventurer. Thank you, truly, thank you. I promise, this time I will not break it or lose it. I will treasure it with all my heart, I swear. And I will not give up until I become a real adventurer.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch Rare Armor (2x), Fetch Rare Weapon (2x), Fetch Uncommon Accessory (2x) (Looted/Handled)

1 [[Random Epic Armor|Random Epic Armor]]
125 Experience

The Squire's Hesitation.greetingtext: This time, I don't want to be a burden to anyone, so I'm looking for a place I can explore on my own. I heard the Goblin Caves aren't too difficult for a beginner adventurer. What do you think? Still, the thought of going alone is a bit scary... If you don't mind, could you check the caves out first? Just to see if there are any safe spots or places to hide, even just a little. Hehe... thank you.
The Squire's Hesitation.completetext: Hearing your words makes me feel a little more at ease. I'll be careful and stick to the places you mentioned. I promise! So, wish me luck, alright?

For the Squire.greetingtext: Well... I did make it as far as the cave entrance, but... there were a lot more goblins than I expected. With that many, I don't think I could handle even one on my own. And if they surround me, I'd be in real trouble. Adventurer, would you be willing to take care of some of the goblins for me? I think I'd find the courage to try again if I knew it was a little safer.
For the Squire.completetext: I'll never forget your kindness. I won't give up until I truly become an adventurer, no matter what. And I'll keep doing my best to help the other adventurers too. Especially you. I'll make sure everything is prepared with extra care, just for you. Thank you so much!

Marks of Malice.greetingtext: I've had an influx of patients recently—so I need more supplies, stat. Many of them have those marks, carved deep into their skin. Some of the cuts are precise, almost surgical, while others look like they were made by a less experienced hand. There's something about these wounds that's disturbing.
Marks of Malice.completetext: While you were gone, I confirmed my hypothesis. They're not healing like they should, and I can't help but wonder if whatever was used to make those cuts was coated in some kind of poison. I need to look into something, and I'll need your help soon, so hurry back.

In the Name of Progress.greetingtext: I am a physician, but there are things in this world that cannot be treated with a scalpel. Curses, souls, and other abnormalities. Such entities exist even within the Ruins. They do not behave like anything that truly lives. I cannot heal them, but I can study them.
In the Name of Progress.completetext: As I have grown older, my knowledge has increased, yet there is still much left to learn in this world. The entities found in the Ruins are among them. It is time for a more thorough examination of things whose nature remains unknown.

Whispers of the Past.greetingtext: I've been investigating the Spectral Knight's chambers, and I've found signs of recent activity. Something happened there recently, and I need you to search for traces of a ritual. It's vital we uncover what was done, as it could give us a clearer understanding of what we're up against.
Whispers of the Past.completetext: What you found in those chambers paints a clearer picture, but there's still much to unravel. The ritual is tied to the curse, and we're getting closer to understanding its source.

Doctor's Orders.greetingtext: Oh dear, it looks like our medical supplies are running dangerously low. You'll be able to retrieve more from the crates hidden in the Forgotten Castle.
Doctor's Orders.completetext: Great job! Just what the doctor ordered!

Undead Eradication.greetingtext: I must admit my curiosity for knowledge gets the best of me at times. I'm interested with the inner workings of a couple particular creatures in the castle. Your assistance in this matter would be greatly appreciated.
Undead Eradication.completetext: Simply incredible. Not in a millennia would I have ever guessed this to be the case. Do not disclose my actions to my brother as he despises my methods. Take these for your vow of silence.

Prepared For The Unexpected.completetext: That will do the job. Precision and reliability are important in my field of work. It's a shame my brother doesn't hold the same standards.

Frost Aid.greetingtext: Suffering an unattended injury in the unforgiving chill of the mountains can be a death call. I can explain the process but I recommend first hand practice with proper first aid to improve your survival odds. Only utilize a potion if worse comes to worse.
Frost Aid.completetext: I hate to admit it but my brother's concoctions may have some use after all. Still, I stand by methods as the most effective.

Sanctified Healing.greetingtext: Even as a man of science, I must admit that the power of the divine have their role. I am however curious as to the limits of the gods. I have a simple experiment I'd like you to undertake for me.
Sanctified Healing.completetext: I must admit I was a little mistaken. It seems that the gods are more powerful than I initially thought.

Purging Darkness.greetingtext: I fear that the forces of darkness grow ever stronger. You must be our beacon of hope and if you should ever be injured in battle, remember what I have taught you.
Purging Darkness.completetext: Well done, my friend! I am happy to see that my teachings were able to keep you in one piece.

150 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]

Stone And Bones.greetingtext: Alas, I have a final task to ask of you. There's a door, marked by stone or bones. Beyond this door is an ancient evil who must be vanquished.
Stone And Bones.completetext: Amazing job! Keep exploring, keep learning, and who knows what other secrets you might uncover.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Lich]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (1x)

Stone And Bones.rewards:
150 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Epic Armor|Random Epic Armor]]
1000 Experience
10 Affinity

Verification of Medical Supplies.greetingtext: More and more people are using the medical supplies found in the dungeon. I warned them not to use unverified items, but no one seems to listen. Do you think the same way they do? ...Adventurers, honestly. If that's the case, then at the very least, I want to ensure their safety. Please help me by testing as many of these dungeon-sourced medical supplies as possible and reporting the results.
Verification of Medical Supplies.completetext: How was it? Did your condition worsen in any way? Or were there any side effects...? Are you saying it was truly fine? Even though the most basic hygiene must have been lacking, it still worked? ...If it's effective, I suppose I can't stop people from using it. Though I still hope they reconsider. In any case, thank you for letting me know.

Whose Scream Is It?.greetingtext: Strange rumors have been spreading recently. They say screams can be heard throughout the Forgotten Castle. Of course, that place has never been silent—I know that well. However... they claim these are the screams of a woman. Yet, there were no female adventurers present. Could you verify whether this is merely a rumor or something real?
Whose Scream Is It?.completetext: Are you saying you heard nothing at all? ...I see. Very well. I asked you to investigate just in case, but perhaps finding nothing is actually for the best. At the very least, I hope the leathersmith never hears of these rumors. I don't wish to see that look of disappointment on his face again.

The Worth of the Dungeon.greetingtext: I am considering ways to repurpose the fabrics recovered from the dungeon. Since many adventurers are already using dungeon-sourced medical supplies without hesitation, I wonder if other materials could also be of use. If I find something suitable, it could help compensate for the shortage of resources. I would appreciate it if you could gather as many different types of fabric as possible.
The Worth of the Dungeon.completetext: Thanks to you, I'll have enough materials to experiment with for a while. I only hope that at least one of these fabrics proves useful as a resource. First, I'll need to boil them thoroughly to cleanse them.

Cutting Edge.greetingtext: You've arrived. Good to see you still standing. I've got a dark muse whispering in my ear and a new creation that demands to be brought to life. I need someone I can rely on for this task. Let's make sure you haven't grown lazy and soft like the cushions on my settee. We're not getting any younger, unfortunately.
Cutting Edge.completetext: You haven't lost your touch, it seems. But don't think we're done yet. This is only the beginning of something bigger, something far more intricate. We'll move on to the next phase soon enough. When you're ready, come back and we'll continue this work.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Skeleton Swordman]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (3x), Kill [[Skeleton Archer]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (3x)

Cutting Edge.rewards:
35 Experience
35 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Uncommon Armor|Random Uncommon Armor]]

What Has Been Worn Away.greetingtext: Lately, I have been repairing more garments than making new ones, especially those worn by adventurers returning from their journeys. If they are damaged to this extent, the cause cannot be ordinary. If you are willing, could you look into it for me? Should you encounter anything dangerous, please take care and bring back anything that might serve as a clue.
What Has Been Worn Away.completetext: So it was those things that are neither dead nor alive. Where do these cursed creatures even come from? I have also heard of people returning from their expeditions in a rather peculiar state. I cannot help but wonder if there is a connection. This is something I must look into.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Sturdy Cloth]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Rotten Fluids]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled)

What Has Been Worn Away.rewards:
35 Experience
35 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Arcane Essence|Uncommon Arcane Essence]]

Blood at the Barbican.greetingtext: I looked further into the people returning in such a wretched state. Some of them were spotted near the outskirts of the Forgotten Castle. Could you go and see for yourself what is happening there? Whether it is connected to the curse or not, we need to know. If you come across any traces of slaughter or battle, bring back whatever you can.
Blood at the Barbican.completetext: So it was no ordinary place after all. The clues are certainly there, but this curse is far more complicated than I expected. The Barbican was no simple defensive structure. The deeper we dig, the more tangled the truth becomes. We may need to seek advice from someone with more experience in these matters.

objectives.objectivessummary: Explore [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] Barbican module (1x)

Blood at the Barbican.rewards:
50 Experience
50 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Uncommon Armor|Random Uncommon Armor]]
2 [[Arcane Essence|Uncommon Arcane Essence]]
1 [[Random Uncommon Weapon|Random Uncommon Weapon]]

Beasts of Burden.greetingtext: I've worked with fabric all my life, weaving threads into something stronger. But now? Now the threads of this land are fraying, unraveling. These creatures, this cursed wilderness—there's something far darker at play here, and it's not just about survival. It's about control. They're being manipulated. If we can cut down the monsters and uncover what they're hiding, we might be able to stop the unraveling.
Beasts of Burden.completetext: Good work, but you look like you've had your share of the wilds. This curse—it's not just an accident of nature. There's something behind it, something that keeps tightening the noose around us.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Ruins Golem]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (1x), Kill [[Dire Wolf]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (3x)

Beasts of Burden.rewards:

50 Experience
25 Affinity

Tailored Wellness.greetingtext: Look at you, not quite as tattered as when you first came in, but still showing signs of wear. Don't ignore it—those ruins don't just take their toll on your body, they gnaw at your spirit, too. The Shrines of Health should do the trick for now, but you've got to keep yourself in one piece if you want to keep moving forward.
Tailored Wellness.completetext: Better, much better. You're not quite the mess you were, but we're far from done. Now, back to the task at hand. I need to have a word with someone. Meet me here later when you're ready to continue.

1.summary: Interact with [[Shrine of Health]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (2x) (single session)

In Shambles.greetingtext: Seeing you in this state takes me back to my own beginnings—digging through trash for scraps, with nothing to my name but hunger and desperation. Let's gather what's needed, and I'll help you craft something that leads to a better tomorrow.
In Shambles.completetext: Ah, with these materials, I can work wonders. Let me weave my magic. There, now you look like someone I wouldn't mind being seen with.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Spider Silk]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Old Bloody Bandage]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled)

In Shambles.rewards:
50 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Uncommon Weapon|Random Uncommon Weapon]]
50 Experience
25 Affinity

Tar and Textile.greetingtext: I heard the news. So it's finally possible to reach the Blue Maelstrom, is it? Perfect timing, really. I've been in need of new materials. Sailors, I'm told, coat cloth with tar to make it waterproof. Could you bring me a sail and some tar? The condition of the sail doesn't matter. I simply want to examine the texture myself. I'm counting on you.
Tar and Textile.completetext: Hmm, this fabric is thick and coarse. It wouldn't be suitable for proper clothing as it is. I'd need a heavy needle and thick thread just to sew it. Still, the fact that it's waterproof is quite appealing. I'll need to give some thought to how I can make use of this tar.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Torn Sail]] (any rarity) (3x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Tar]] (any rarity) (3x) (Looted/Handled)

Tar and Textile.rewards:
100 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Rare Weapon|Random Rare Weapon]]
200 Experience

The Potential of Ink.greetingtext: Ink is hard to come by, which is why it's usually reserved for fine writing inks. But who's to say the ink of a cuttlefish from the Blue Maelstrom isn't something entirely different? If it can be used as a dye, this could be a remarkable discovery.
The Potential of Ink.completetext: Well done. It couldn't have been easy to keep it in such good condition. Thanks to you, I'll be able to run a few tests with it. I'll be counting on you again next time.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Cuttlefish]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/ShipGraveyard-01-N ShipGraveyard] dungeon (2x), Fetch [[Cuttlefish Ink Sac]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled)

The Potential of Ink.rewards:

Luminous Cloth.greetingtext: I've heard rumors of jellyfish in the Blue Maelstrom that give off their own light. They say you can extract a glowing fluid from them if you manage to kill one. Could you get some for me? If I can use that fluid to create luminous fabric, I'll have the attention and admiration of the upper class in no time!
Luminous Cloth.completetext: This liquid is truly fascinating. It gives off a soft glow during the day and shines even brighter at night. Even the way it feels on my fingertips is something special. I'll probably lose sleep for days just thinking about how and where to use it. Thank you so much!

Cold Shoulder.greetingtext: Frost Mountain offers more than just cold winds and icy peaks. It holds the promise of timeless beauty, its wintry embrace offering a chance to defy the ravages of time.
Cold Shoulder.completetext: The bitter cold of Frost Mountain invokes memories of a time when my survival seemed uncertain. Yet here I stand, fabulous as ever! Now, onto matters of utmost importance - securing my status at the upcoming elite soirée. Be on your way so I can focus on what I am going to wear.

2.summary: Kill [[Frozen Ghost]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/IceCavern-01-N Ice Cavern] dungeon (3x)

Murmurs Among The Aristocracy.greetingtext: Amidst the opulent festivities of high society, I caught wind of troubling news. The rumors of some strange monstrous beasts roaming these lands. You know how most nobility are, don't you? They'll vanish to their countryside estates if we don't address this threat swiftly.
Murmurs Among The Aristocracy.completetext: Exemplary as always! I've worked hard to reach where I am, and I refuse to rely on any more handouts from my adopted family. So, lend your strength to make these lands safer, ensuring the wealthy continue investing here.

2.summary: Kill [[Frost Demon]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/IceCavern-01-N Ice Cavern] dungeon (3x)

Infiltrating With Accessories.greetingtext: We have an intriguing assignment today. You will be procuring materials so I can craft accessories as part of a covert operation, designed to deceive one of the dark lords. By gaining their favor, we aim to secure access and gather information.
Infiltrating With Accessories.completetext: Kudos acquiring the materials. You won't be the one making the offering, for they will know you are an imposter. I have someone in mind whom I will disguise as a potential Dark Follower to carry out this delicate task.

An Uncomfortable Request.greetingtext: To win the favor of the upper class, one must know plenty of entertaining stories. Young lords, in particular, are especially fond of tales of adventure. One such curious young master has made a rather troublesome request—he wants someone to slay the monsters of Frost Mountain on his behalf and then recount the adventure to him. What do you think? Are you interested? At the very least, the reward will be generous.
An Uncomfortable Request.completetext: Alright. I'll make sure to deliver your brave tale—embellished just enough to suit the young lord's taste. What is routine for us is nothing more than a fantastical story for them.

Tales of the Frost Mountain Expedition.greetingtext: Hmm, it seems your tale was well received. This time, the young lord wants to hear about the fascinating locations in Frost Mountain. There's only so much I can make up on my own, you know. Since we've already started this, why don't you help me out? Explore Frost Mountain thoroughly and find places that are grand, beautiful, or unique enough to make for a good story.
Tales of the Frost Mountain Expedition.completetext: Oh, there are a few things worth using. With a bit of embellishment, they should make for a fine tale. Thank you. But... I couldn't help but notice, just like last time—you're not exactly gifted at storytelling.

Fantasy and Reality.greetingtext: There's a problem. The young lord enjoyed our stories too much—so much that he now insists on becoming an adventurer! His mother, the lady of the house, is furious! If this keeps up, my connections will be ruined! No, that cannot happen. It's time to show this naïve young lord a taste of reality.
Fantasy and Reality.completetext: Alright, this is graphic enough—disgustingly so. Now, let's string it together and wrap it up nicely... Oh, don't worry too much. I'll only show just enough. Hopefully, this will make the young lord abandon his foolish dream.
Fantasy and Reality.requiredquest: Tales of the Frost Mountain Expedition

The Cave of Inspiration.greetingtext: Frost Mountain truly boasts a breathtaking view. I visited once, long ago, and the Ice Caverns in particular... such mystique, such atmosphere. It stirs the creative fire in artists like myself. Hmm, do you happen to know how to draw? If so, be a dear and sketch the caverns for me, will you? I have a feeling they'll spark some marvelous ideas for my next line.
The Cave of Inspiration.completetext: Well, you may not be much of a talker, but your sketches are surprisingly decent. Thank you. They'll be quite helpful for my next design.

The Stylish One's Survival Strategy.greetingtext: Looking at your sketches has only confirmed it for me, I simply must see it with my own eyes. But as much as my stitching is impeccable, I must admit, combat isn't exactly my forte. I know it's dangerous, and I'm not foolish enough to charge in unprepared. So how about this, you go on ahead and deal with the monsters for me. I promise the reward will be well worth your while.
The Stylish One's Survival Strategy.completetext: Thank you. Your talents truly shine brightest as an adventurer. Thanks to you, Frost Mountain should be safe for a while. I'll be able to visit with peace of mind now.

How to Use a Wendigo.greetingtext: When I visited Frost Mountain, I caught sight of a wendigo in the distance. I used to think all monsters were just hideous brutes, but the wendigo... there's something different about it. Striking. That peculiar form of its... it might even inspire some patterns or embellishments for a new outfit. Of course, I can't very well ask you to bring one back alive, so just collect whatever parts you can find. I'll decide later whether they're worth using.
How to Use a Wendigo.completetext: Oh, you really did bring everything you could, didn't you... First of all, these entrails, the stench is absolutely unbearable. I need to get rid of them before the smell clings to my fabrics. Now, the rest... intriguing, really. The horns have a magnificent curve to them. And this heart, how extraordinary. Cold as carved ice, yet still faintly pulsing. I like it. Get ready. I'm going to create something the world has never seen.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Wendigo's Entrails]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Wendigo's Hoof]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Wendigo's Sharp Claws]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Frozen Heart]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Wendigo's Antler Fragment]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled)

How to Use a Wendigo.rewards:

order: The Child Who Dreams of Adventure

Is it you?.greetingtext: Once, those skeletons were men, brave warriors who swore to protect this kingdom. But the king's hunger for darkness twisted everything. Their souls were bound by a curse, left to wander without rest. There is a prophecy, they say, that a 'chosen one' will break the curse and grant them peace. I once believed I could be that person, but it proved to be a difficult path. Regardless, someone must put an end to this curse. Whether that someone is you or not... there's no harm in trying.
Is it you?.completetext: When you put them down, did you feel it? A shift in the air, like something heavy finally lifted? I have a hunch about this. Go visit the Alchemist and tell him I sent you. He might be able to tell you more about what's really going on here. I'll be heading there myself soon enough. There's something stirring in my gut... and it's not the ale.

A Strange Freshness.greetingtext: That old castle should hold nothing but rot, yet food and drink still turn up there. Fresh fruit, even meals that are still warm, are not something to brush aside. If you find anything like that in the castle, bring it to me. And whatever you do, do not try eating it yourself.
A Strange Freshness.completetext: I've taken a look at what you brought back, and there doesn't seem to be anything wrong with it. It smells fine, and it even seems fit to eat. All the more strange. What kind of magic could be at work in that cursed castle...

Paper and Ink.greetingtext: I seem to have misplaced something important, something more than just paper and ink... a map, to be exact. It once led me to places I preferred to forget, but now I need it. The forgotten castle might still hold the answers, or perhaps more nightmares. Think you can find it in that cursed place?
Paper and Ink.completetext: This map... it's got history. Every mark on it tells of a time before everything fell apart. Maybe one day, I'll tell you all about it over a drink... or perhaps over something stronger. But for now, the map is yours.

The First Trial.greetingtext: Ah, you've returned. I paid a visit to our friend, but we'll need a few things before we can move forward. It's the first of many trials, if you can call them that. Gather what's needed, and we'll see where this leads. If you succeed, we'll talk about the next step—but let's not get ahead of ourselves, eh? One thing at a time.
The First Trial.completetext: You've done well, but don't relax just yet. There's a long road ahead, and the challenges will only grow harder. The tavern's packed at the moment—swing by later when things settle.

Bloody Fingers.greetingtext: I've got another task for you, and it won't be pretty. The mages—they'll tear through your defenses if you're not careful. As for the champion... well, if you make it back, you'll understand why they call it that. Take them down, and we'll have one less obstacle standing between us and the truth. Keep your head on straight—this one's going to test your patience.
Bloody Fingers.completetext: Well done. Those mages won't be casting their spells again, and the champion's fallen, as expected. But don't let your guard down just yet. Had a strange visitor the other night—he was covered in blood and wore a necklace with freshly cut, bloody fingers. When he saw me looking, he quickly covered himself with his cloak, ate, and left. We'll talk more later; never know who's listening.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Skeleton Mage]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (2x), Kill [[Skeleton Champion]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (1x)

Wenchless.greetingtext: Good to see you back in one piece. Things are a mess around here—my wenches have all come down with something, and I'm starting to think it's not just the roasted rabbit from the other night. In times like this, it's always smart to have a backup plan. You never know when you'll need a quick exit.
Wenchless.completetext: Good to see you back. The wenches? Still laid up with something, and I'm starting to think it's more than just food poisoning. Things have quieted down for now, so I'm thinking of paying the Surgeon another visit. Hopefully, he's got something that'll get them back on their feet—customers are a lot more satisfied when there are busty women to serve them.

objectives.objectivessummary: Survive [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (3x)

Wagers and Favors.greetingtext: The Collector lost badly in a wager with the Goblin Merchant, and now the debt has fallen to me. I suppose that is the price of an old favor I once owed him. To settle it, I'll need a few valuables. Bring them to me, and I promise a reward worthy of your effort.
Wagers and Favors.completetext: Impressive! These gleaming gems will do the trick. The Collector will be satisfied, and you've more than earned your compensation.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Gem Ring]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Gem Necklace]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled)

30 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Uncommon Weapon|Random Uncommon Weapon]]
25 Experience

A Legacy of Pain.greetingtext: Greetings. I have been kept busy lately, tending to the belongings of adventurers who passed through the tavern and never returned. It is a task that never gets easier, no matter how much time goes by. But what troubles me more is what these poor souls endured. Branded, tortured like animals, left to perish in silence until death finally claimed them. One of my regulars has given me a lead. They believe they know where their loved one was last found. I think we should investigate.
A Legacy of Pain.completetext: The evidence you uncovered paints a grim picture of what's happening. The ritualistic marks, the suffering... But if the rumors are true, and someone or something is devouring their souls, I wonder... Come back soon. I need to look into something.

objectives.objectivessummary: Explore [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] Outer Cemetery module (1x)

Whispers of the Devoured.greetingtext: You're back. Good. I've been mulling over something—rumors of creatures that devour souls. The wraiths are the first of many, I suspect. If we slay them, perhaps the souls trapped in this cycle will find rest. And if we're lucky, those still living might snap out of whatever trance they're in. It's a long shot, but it's a start.
Whispers of the Devoured.completetext: The wraith is gone, but sadly, no change in the living. I'll need to do some research and figure out what our next move should be. Come back soon; we'll need to plan more precisely and carefully than when I'm balancing the books.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Wraith]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (1x)

Buried Secrets.greetingtext: Rumors suggest that the bodies within may have been among the first to be subjected to the same ritualistic torment as those more recent poor souls. Search for any clues—check if their tongues were severed or if strange markings are carved into their flesh. We can't be sure until we investigate. If there's any connection, we need to understand it before this spreads further.
Buried Secrets.completetext: One of the bodies did indeed bear markings similar to those we've encountered before—though they seem slightly different. This suggests a deeper, darker evolution of whatever is at play. We're not done yet, though. I'll need more time to piece these findings together. Come back soon.

objectives.objectivessummary: Explore [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] Abandoned Sanctuary module (1x)

Easing the Burden.greetingtext: When I think of those poor souls and their families, left to bear the weight of debts they never agreed to, my heart grows heavy. It is a cruel irony that the dead leave behind not only sorrow but financial ruin. I wish to help free them, but to do so we must gather the necessary funds. Bring me some silver coins, and we can begin to ease their suffering.
Easing the Burden.completetext: Good work. This is a solid start, but it won't be enough to clear all the debts left behind by the dead. We'll need more, but at least we're on the right path. For now, this will help begin the process of easing their suffering.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Silver Coin]] (any rarity) (10x) (Looted/Handled)

Easing the Burden.rewards:
50 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Uncommon Armor|Random Uncommon Armor]]
50 Experience

Misplaced Muffin.greetingtext: Nice to see you again. The families are starting to feel the weight lift, and I'm hoping there's something of real value hidden inside those Mimics. Whatever we find could go a long way in easing their suffering.
Misplaced Muffin.completetext: Good work. The families have asked me to express their gratitude. One even baked you a Chocolate Chip Muffin as a token of thanks. Unfortunately, I seem to have misplaced it... though I swear I didn't eat it. In any case, the silver and other valuables you've brought will make a real difference.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Mimic]] (2x)

Misplaced Muffin.rewards:
50 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
4 [[Arcane Essence|Uncommon Arcane Essence]]
75 Experience
5 Affinity

Ceremonial Cup.greetingtext: I've heard whispers—dark rumors—of a chalice, one used in the first rituals. It's said to lie hidden in the Forgotten Castle, a relic of blood and shadows. I don't need to tell you that it's no ordinary artifact. It's something far darker. Something that could give us the answers we desperately seek, or drag us deeper into this abyss. I need you to find it before it's too late. The darkness is spreading, and we need to understand what secrets it holds before they consume us all.
Ceremonial Cup.completetext: The chalice you've brought back is undeniably foul, a palpable darkness clinging to it like a stain. But is it the one we need? I'll send it to someone more skilled in these matters to confirm our findings. In the meantime, I've been informed of other pressing issues that will require your attention sooner rather than later.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Silver Chalice]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled)

3 [[Great Potion of Luck|Epic Great Potion of Luck]]
200 Experience

Purging the Path.greetingtext: I have been informed that there were many pieces used in the original ceremony beyond the chalice you found. My contact is still digging deeper, but some of these missing pieces may lie within the King's Treasure Room. We will need to clear out any undead protectors lingering there before we can get close to the truth. Once you have dealt with the threats inside, come see me.
Purging the Path.completetext: The information you gathered was helpful to my contact and is leading us deeper into the mystery. We are starting to piece things together, though there is still much left to uncover. The truth is closer now, but it is going to take time to fully understand the significance of what we are dealing with. Return soon, the next step of this journey is just ahead.

Arsenal of the Forsaken.greetingtext: There is one more thing we must uncover. According to my contact's investigation, there is a possibility that traces of the ritual remain within the armory of the Forgotten Castle. Go and see for yourself what lies hidden there. Do not overlook any markings, symbols, or relics engraved on weapons or armor. Every detail could prove to be a vital clue.
Arsenal of the Forsaken.completetext: What was found in the armory has revealed far more than we expected. Yet this is only the beginning. What we have uncovered is merely a piece of the puzzle, and it is likely that the answers lie hidden somewhere deeper. There is a door that has been sealed for far too long. When you are ready, we must face whatever lies beyond it together.

objectives.objectivessummary: Explore [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] Armory module (1x)

1 [[Random Rare Weapon|Random Rare Weapon]]
175 Experience
25 Affinity

Icy Bastards.greetingtext: Word around the tavern is that some frost-bitten creatures have been roaming the outskirts, freezing everything in their path. I've got an old friend who might know a way to deal with them, but he needs some muscle first. If you're willing to brave the cold, I'll see you're compensated properly. Just don't let those icy bastards catch you off guard.
Icy Bastards.completetext: I'll make sure word gets around that you're not someone to be trifled with. Come by for a drink sometime, you've earned more than just the coin.

Frosty Escapes.greetingtext: Now that you've got some experience under your belt, I've got a task that'll put your skills to the test. We need to check the escape routes—make sure they're clear and ready in case things go south. It's cold out there, though, so make sure you bundle up. Last thing I need is for you to catch a chill... or worse.
Frosty Escapes.completetext: Back already? You look frozen solid! Go thaw out by the fire while I fetch you something to warm you up from the inside—my own recipe.

A Giant Problem.greetingtext: Ready to face some real danger? We've got frost-covered fiends lurking in the shadows of Frost Mountain. A search party's heading up to look for that missing girl, and they could use some backup. I need you to help clear the way, make sure they're not walking into a death trap.
A Giant Problem.completetext: The search party should be in safer hands now. Come on back and take a seat. I've got some hearty stew waiting for you—warm you up after all that cold. You've earned it.

The Unraveling.greetingtext: Something has been shifting in the shadows lately, and I am not the only one who has noticed. The tavern, once brimming with chatter and laughter, is growing quieter by the day. Even my staff have fallen ill with a strange sickness I cannot explain. Some say the darkness is coming from the Forgotten Castle. The brothers have suggested we investigate the matter there. Will you lend us your help?
The Unraveling.completetext: We've learned what we can for now, but we can't afford to stop here. The darkness is spreading, and we need more information to understand how to break this curse. Time is slipping away. One of my wenches... she's gone. Choked on her own blood and bile. The others may not be far behind. We need to press on, gather more answers before it's too late for them—before it's too late for all of us.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Death Skull]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (12x), Kill [[Mummy]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (7x)

The Unraveling.rewards:
100 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Rare Armor|Random Rare Armor]]
175 Experience

Cursed Connections.greetingtext: The situation is growing dire. As they were preparing the body of my deceased staff member for burial, she came back to life! But she was not the same. She attacked anyone who came near, even tearing a chunk out of one of the priests. This... this is the nightmare we are dealing with. We must continue looking into the origins of this curse and find a way to stop it.
Cursed Connections.completetext: The priest who tried to help her is now infected. We had no choice but to put him down before he could do any more harm. This is no ordinary curse. I cannot help but wonder if it might be something else entirely. Regardless, your findings have given us a new lead, and that is something we can build upon.
