Dark Advisor.greetingtext: We must proceed carefully and find solid evidence before drawing conclusions. The Lich was once the king's most loyal court wizard, and from everything we have uncovered so far, it seems he may have had a much larger role in this than we first suspected. Search the Forgotten Castle and bring back anything that proves his involvement. Only then can we begin to prepare our next move.
Dark Advisor.completetext: The Lich's involvement is undeniable. He was the king's most trusted, and from the evidence you have gathered, it appears he played a much larger role in this curse than we ever imagined. However, the details remain unclear. We must dig deeper, and at the same time, focus on preparing for the battles ahead. Visit me soon, adventurer. We must inform the others of our findings and plan our next move.

Iron Tight.greetingtext: Deep below The Forgotten Castle lies an iron door sealed shut. It is known to be heavily guarded... but the reason why is still unknown. I need you to go find out what that reason might be.
Iron Tight.completetext: I didn't think you had it in you... you really do know your way around down there. Don't go too far, I will be needing your skills again soon.

Something Marvelous.greetingtext: Rumors of a grand chest filled with blessed riches have echoed around these parts for years... but after hearing some tavern talk, I am convinced I know where it sits. If you think you have what it takes, I will guide you on your way to open it once and for all!
Something Marvelous.completetext: That chest held everything I imagined and more! If you find yourself a few more chests like that, you might become the richest adventurer in town!

A Legendary Addition.completetext: I knew you would find it, but I didn't expect you to be so quick! I hope this reward is fair compensation for your tremendous effort.

The Land in Flames.greetingtext: A dwarf miner came into my tavern not long ago. Hadn't seen one of his kind in quite some time, and he was covered in wounds. Said they made a grave mistake and unleashed a calamity of fire upon their land. He managed to escape, but many of his kin are still held there, bound under its control. He's looking for someone capable of helping him. Said he needs a proven hand. Would you be willing to take the job?
The Land in Flames.completetext: I know what you're capable of, but the miner wanted to be certain. Felt bad about dragging someone like you into such dangerous business. Still, seeing you back in one piece should put his mind at ease.

Traces of the Scattered.greetingtext: The miner says he had companions with him when he fled his homeland. They got separated in the chaos, and he's heard nothing from them since. He's looking for someone to go and search for any trace of them. Says it's a place of intense heat, but their dwarven shrines should help make things more manageable. I'm asking on his behalf.
Traces of the Scattered.completetext: The miner's face fell when I told him nothing was found. Though if you ask me, I'm relieved. At least there were no bodies to speak of. Bad news has a way of weighing on the one who delivers it, not just the one who receives it.

Those Bound in Fire.greetingtext: The miner has asked me to pass along another request. He says Ignir, the calamity of fire, has seized control of his kin by eroding their minds. But if even one of them still has their senses, he wants them brought back. There may be fighting involved. He understands that, and so should you.
Those Bound in Fire.completetext: Not one of them with their senses intact. I had a feeling it might come to this, but hearing it said aloud sits heavy with me. I'm not sure how to break it to him.

Protector's Wrath.completetext: You've returned safely. Seeing this, I know you dealt with those fiends for certain. Your skill is truly remarkable. I celebrate your victory and grant you a reward worthy of it.

Confronting The Darkness.greetingtext: The number of monsters within the Forgotten Castle continues to grow. Many adventurers strive to cleanse that place, yet it seems impossible to drive away the darkness entirely... Still, we cannot abandon this fight. Their numbers must be thinned. Defeat them and show me proof of your deeds. It will not be easy, but I ask this of you.
Confronting The Darkness.completetext: Tonight we celebrate! Let's drink to your health and fortunes!

For a Sturdy Hull.greetingtext: A sailor stopped by my tavern not long ago. Said she was a navigator, looking for someone to help her repair an old ship. Wants to get her sailing again as a merchant vessel. She asked if I knew anyone suitable, and you came to mind. If you're interested, bring her some sturdy timber and that should get things started.
For a Sturdy Hull.completetext: The navigator stopped by to say the timber was good quality. Sturdy enough that it shouldn't break easily, and she's already started on the deck and hull. Says there's still more work to be done, so I may have another favor to ask of you soon, if you're willing.

The Cloth That Wraps the Wind.greetingtext: Turns out she used to sail with a large merchant fleet. Left the work behind and spent her savings on that old ship. Something happened, I reckon, though she didn't say more than that. Either way, she still needs a hand. This time it's a new sail she's after. Bring her some sturdy cloth and a set of sewing tools if you can.
The Cloth That Wraps the Wind.completetext: She was pleased with what you brought. Said the fabric was thick and sturdy, more than fit for the sea. Just a little more work, she says, and the ship will be ready to sail.

The Knot That Binds All.greetingtext: That navigator talks about ships at great length every time she comes in. Most of it goes over my head, but I make sure to remember the parts that matter. This time she needs rope. Says there's no end to how much a ship gets through, so she needs some extra on hand. I told her I knew just the person to ask.
The Knot That Binds All.completetext: The navigator says the ship is ready. Anyone who sails near the Blue Maelstrom must know what they're doing, so she's clearly the real thing. If you ever find yourself needing to cross the sea, she's the one to look for.

Shadow of the Past.greetingtext: Seems like pirates are to sailors what monsters are to adventurers. The Black Despair crew in particular have quite a reputation. Plundered countless ships and left a trail of bodies behind them. The navigator said they're the reason she left the fleet. She's looking for someone to deal with them. Adventurer, I'm asking on her behalf.
Shadow of the Past.completetext: I passed along the news to the navigator. She sat quietly with her drink for a while, then asked me to give you her thanks. Said it felt like a small part of an old debt had been repaid. I sense she's got something weighing on her she hasn't shared. Then again, most of the folks who walk through my door do.

Coffins Beneath the Waves.greetingtext: Apparently there are large structures scattered across the Ship Graveyard, shaped like giant shells. Sailors call them mermaid coffins, though no one knows what lies inside. The navigator's brother once studied them. She wants to know the truth, if only for his sake. Would you take a look inside one for her?
Coffins Beneath the Waves.completetext: I passed along what you found to the navigator. She reckoned it was likely remnants from sunken ships. Keepsakes, she called them, traces of those who never made it back. Meant more to her than she let on, I think.

Trial of Worth.completetext: Sounds like she means to avenge her fallen crewmates. Leaving the fleet to run her own merchant vessel seems to be part of that plan. After all, hiring someone of your skill doesn't come cheap. Adventurer, I hope you'll see her through this.

Gold Rush.greetingtext: As you prepare for the battles ahead, remember this. It is not only your weapons and armor that need strengthening, but your coffers as well! The unexpected is always part of any adventure. Having a little extra coin on hand will put your mind at ease when that time comes.
Gold Rush.completetext: Excellent! With each haul from the chests, you grow significantly wealthier. You may soon become the richest adventurer of all.

Behind The Stone.greetingtext: I have heard stories of a stone door deep below The Forgotten Castle... It is said to hold unimaginable legendary treasures, so, how does a hunt sound?
Behind The Stone.completetext: You've truly found it! When I first sent you on this journey, I never believed the legends were real. Yet here you are, proving me wrong—and bringing a myth to life.

If fortune favors you, you may find them among the piles of treasure in that haunted castle. But be careful. You will not be the only one searching for them.
Bangle Lord.completetext: These are perfect! How did you manage to find bangles in this condition? You really have a knack for getting the good stuff.

Beasts in the Flames.greetingtext: The miner tells me Ignir has twisted not only his kin, but the beasts of that land as well. The flame boars in particular were once animals they raised themselves, but now they wander through the fires without reason, driven to rage. Leave them be and they'll become a greater threat. Put them down and bring back what remains as proof.
Beasts in the Flames.completetext: Well done. Though it's a sorry state of affairs. The dwarves were once said to be the finest handlers of fire there ever were, and now they must fight it to reclaim their peace. I hope they find their way back to ordinary days soon, but I don't imagine it'll be easy.

1.summary: Kill [[Flame Boar]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/GoblinCave-01-N Goblin Cave] dungeon (5x)

Unbelievable News.greetingtext: Word has come from those who recently passed through the miner's homeland. They found bodies of his kin there. When he escaped, they were under Ignir's control, but alive. What happened in the time between, I couldn't say. Please go and check on the condition of the fallen.
Unbelievable News.completetext: Bodies already reduced to bone. That's a strange and troubling thing. It seems Ignir is corrupting everything in that place. We must stop him before it is too late.

Servant of Fire.greetingtext: According to the miner, his enthralled kin have been digging without rest. The lava fields have spread as a result, and a lava golem has emerged. He says it's as good as a thrall of Ignir himself. The stronger Ignir's influence grows, the stronger the golem becomes. Take it down before things get any worse.
Servant of Fire.completetext: Well done, truly. Thanks to you, Ignir's influence has been pushed back, if only for a short while. But the miner says he can always create new servants, so we'd best start preparing for what comes next.

Brawler of the Sea.greetingtext: Word came in from the navigator's scouting party. They've been having trouble with the Tidewalkers near the Ship Graveyard. Apparently those creatures attack without hesitation the moment they spot an enemy, and the ones running with a shaman are even worse. Looks like they could use a hand. Would you be willing to step in?
Brawler of the Sea.completetext: Thanks to you, the scouting should go more smoothly for a while. From what I gather, she's been looking for her brother's map. Says it was taken when the pirates captured her. Believes it's somewhere in the Ship Graveyard.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Tidewalker Clubfighter]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/ShipGraveyard-01-N ShipGraveyard] dungeon (5x), Kill [[Tidewalker Boomerang]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/ShipGraveyard-01-N ShipGraveyard] dungeon (5x), Kill [[Tidewalker Spearer]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/ShipGraveyard-01-N ShipGraveyard] dungeon (3x)

Pieces of a Broken Dream.greetingtext: I've got good news and bad news. The good news is that part of the map she's been looking for has turned up. The bad news is that it isn't enough. She still needs the remaining pieces, but with monsters and pirates prowling that area, the search has hit a wall. Would you be willing to track down the rest of the map?
Pieces of a Broken Dream.completetext: Her brother was an archaeologist, it seems. The two of them had been searching for ancient ruins and forgotten sea routes together. Promised each other to set sail and explore once they found something with potential. Now she's on her own. Some stories never get easier to hear, no matter how often they're told.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Old Nautical Chart Fragment]] (any rarity) (3x)

100 Experience
125 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Rare Armor|Random Rare Armor]]

Where the Map Points.greetingtext: The navigator found a spot marked for investigation on the restored map, somewhere deeper in the Ship Graveyard. Likely her brother's doing, she thinks. She wants to know what's there. Adventurer, I'm asking on her behalf.
Where the Map Points.completetext: A fortress-like structure, you say? I'll pass that along to her. I can't say what it means, but I hope it turns out to be something worth looking into. For her sake, and her brother's.

objectives.objectivessummary: Explore [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/ShipGraveyard-01-N ShipGraveyard] Pirate Prison module (1x)

An Unforgotten Memory.greetingtext: I heard some of her story the other day. When the pirates took her ship, most of her crew were thrown overboard. She was the only one who made it out. A sorry thing. There are tales of man-eating fish in the waters of the Blue Maelstrom. Deal with them if you can, and if you come across anything that might have belonged to a sailor, bring it back. I'd like to pass it along to her, just in case.
An Unforgotten Memory.completetext: When I brought her the journal you found, she wept for quite some time. Said it belonged to her crewmate, sure enough. Apparently he was a curious sort, always jotting down whatever caught his interest. She asked me to pass along her thanks for bringing it back. I'll add my own as well.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Moray Eel]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/ShipGraveyard-01-N ShipGraveyard] dungeon (10x), Kill [[Sea Piranha]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/ShipGraveyard-01-N ShipGraveyard] dungeon (10x), Fetch [[Sailor's Journal]] (any rarity) (1x)

An Unforgotten Memory.rewards:
300 Experience
150 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]

A Wish Etched in Ink.greetingtext: She's had her head in that journal every waking minute. Came to see me this morning with something she'd found inside. Says there are pearls that shine without sun or torch, and coral twisted into shapes that shouldn't be. She wants to find them in memory of her lost crewmate. Adventurer, would you bring back the pearl and coral for her?
A Wish Etched in Ink.completetext: The pearl and coral from the Blue Maelstrom are something else, I'll give them that. Strange color and texture, unlike anything you'd find elsewhere. From what I can tell, she means to bring these along with the journal to her crewmate's family. A decent thing to do, if you ask me.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Coral Fragment]] (any rarity) (3x), Fetch [[Shining Pearl]] (any rarity) (1x)

A Wish Etched in Ink.rewards:
300 Experience
150 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Epic Weapon|Random Epic Weapon]]

The Path Beyond the Map.greetingtext: The navigator showed me something from her brother's research notes yesterday. Spoke of a great river that once existed and a guardian said to dwell within it. Most of it was speculation, but the description of the guardian was hard to ignore. A beast with massive jaws, a vertical eye, and thick leathery skin. She thinks it might be connected to the Crocodilian. Hunt them down and bring back one of their eyes, if you would.
The Path Beyond the Map.completetext: Turns out the navigator has an ancient compass of sorts. Place something on it and it points to wherever that thing is connected. She put the eye you brought on it and her expression changed. Said it was pointing to a land abandoned long ago. A place where the river dried up, the earth turned foul, and nothing lives there now. Says she means to investigate it soon.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Crocodilian]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/ShipGraveyard-01-N ShipGraveyard] dungeon (1x), Fetch [[Crocodilian Eyeball]] (any rarity) (1x)

1 [[Random Epic Armor|Random Epic Armor]]
2 [[Arcane Essence|Epic Arcane Essence]]

Superior Equipment.greetingtext: What do you believe ensures safety in an adventure? Skill, of course, is essential. But when skill levels are equal, what makes the difference? Superior equipment. Unfortunately, while decent gear is easy to find here, truly exceptional equipment is rare. In truth, many such treasures lie buried deep within the Forgotten Castle, hidden among hoards of riches. You should seek them out.
Superior Equipment.completetext: I hope you found something of value. I trust in your skill, but I have seen far too many adventurers who relied solely on their abilities, only to never return. I hope to continue seeing you at my tavern, so always ensure you are well-prepared.

What the Alchemist Seeks.greetingtext: Do you remember the stone door you opened last time? Now that we know for certain that treasures lie beyond such doors, we must investigate the rumors of other sealed passages as well. Open them and see what lies beyond. And... if you come across any treasure that carries a strange aura, be sure to let me know.
What the Alchemist Seeks.completetext: Was there nothing unusual? I see... Actually, I've heard that an Alchemist has been searching for something lately. As you know, Alchemists will do anything in the name of their experiments—whether for good or ill, it hardly matters to them. This time, he's looking for a particular item, and I find that concerning... If I find out what exactly he seeks, I will let you know.

The Ominous Crown.greetingtext: I've discovered what the Alchemist is searching for—a cursed crown. No matter what is done to it, it remains unscathed, and the gemstone at its center glows even in complete darkness. Can you find it before he does? I do not know what curse it carries, but this time, the Alchemist must not be allowed to obtain it. I have a bad feeling about this.
The Ominous Crown.completetext: This seems to be the one. It's a relief that you found it first. Please keep this matter a secret from the Alchemist. I know he has accomplished remarkable things and has helped many people, but I worry that one day, he may cross a line he cannot return from. I only hope that day never comes.

The Pirate's Refuge.greetingtext: The navigator's scouting parties have been combing through the Ship Graveyard, but it's rough out there. She needs someone to go in and take a closer look at the places the pirates frequent. Would you be willing to help? They're not to be underestimated, so watch yourself.
The Pirate's Refuge.completetext: Thank you for checking. Sounds like their weapons aren't in as good a shape as we'd thought, and they don't appear to be hiding much either. I'll see that the navigator hears all of this.

The Price of Loyalty.greetingtext: According to the navigator, the Black Despair pirates are blindly loyal to their captain. Long fancied themselves masters of the sea, plundering and burning countless ships along the way. Her ship likely met that same fate. Those wretches have a debt to pay. Adventurer, please help her see that they do.
The Price of Loyalty.completetext: Well done, truly. Hearing this should bring the navigator some measure of peace. Just one step left now. She says she still has one last thing to ask of you, so don't disappear on us.

Despair's End.greetingtext: There isn't a sailor alive who hasn't heard of Captain Bladehand, or so they say. The navigator told me she's been waiting for this day ever since she survived his attack. Says everything is in place now, and she's asking you to finish it.
Despair's End.completetext: I passed along the news to the navigator straight away. She sat quietly for a long while, then spoke. Said she hoped her fallen crewmates could finally rest in peace. Asked me to give you her sincerest thanks. I reckon she can put the past behind her now and start living for herself. Have a seat, friend. First drink's on me tonight.

To Find An Opening.greetingtext: The miner wants to assess Ignir's condition before confronting him directly. He's asking you to look into the area around the great forge and observe the flames and the flow of the lava. Says that with Ignir pouring his strength into expanding his control, he can't be maintaining perfect command over everything. Find that opening.
To Find An Opening.completetext: The miner's eyes sharpened when I told him the flow of fire was unstable. Said it means Ignir's power is being spread thin. We need to move quickly, he says.

Final Preparations.greetingtext: The miner says the fire spirits and elementals are what help Ignir recover his strength. They act as conduits, gathering the power of fire and delivering it to him. Leave them be and the scattered power will come together again before long. He's asking you to take them out and slow that process down. Adventurer, I'm asking on his behalf.
Final Preparations.completetext: Well done. The miner says all the preparations that can be made have been made. With those who aid Ignir lying low, now is the time to act. Come back when you're ready.

The Incomplete Colossus.greetingtext: Dwarf legend has it that Ignir in his true form is a being made solely of living lava. But with the seal broken incompletely, he now bears the form of a fire colossus, solid stone entwined with molten fire. The miner says we must stop him before he reclaims that true form. Adventurer, please put an end to him.
The Incomplete Colossus.completetext: Well done, adventurer. The miner says a spirit like Ignir doesn't fade so easily. He's likely hiding within the lava, waiting for another chance. He means to find a way to seal him completely before he can recover his strength. He also asked me to pass along his thanks. Here, drink up. Tonight's ale is on him.

No End in Sight.greetingtext: The lower reaches of the Forgotten Castle have already become a den of demons. The trouble is, their numbers are not thinning but growing still. If this keeps on, they will start crawling upward soon enough. We need to act before that happens. There is no need to go too deep. Just start thinning out the ones in plain sight.
No End in Sight.completetext: Well done. Do not take lesser demons lightly. There is no end to them. Cut one down and another soon takes its place. Truth be told, the worst of it is that there is no time to rest. Still, thanks to you, we can catch our breath tonight.

500 Experience

A Different Kind.greetingtext: I have heard rumors of a creature unlike the common run of demons. The details are still uncertain, but one thing is clear. It is a far harsher foe than any you have faced so far. While the demons we have seen until now were little more than raging beasts, this creature operates with malicious purpose. Judge with care, and do not overreach.
A Different Kind.completetext: You have done well. Judging by the look on your face, they were no easy prey. Still, you have returned alive. There is no better news than that.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Demon Executioner]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (5x)

A Different Kind.rewards:
500 Experience
200 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Legendary Armor|Random Legendary Armor]]

The One in Command.greetingtext: There is one that commands the demons. You might call it the one that governs the Inferno. Many adventurers have tried to slay the odious overseer, but all have failed. In the past, I would not have sat idle upon hearing this. But I am no longer in a body that can answer such a call. So I would entrust this to the one I trust most. Adventurer, I ask this of you.
The One in Command.completetext: You made it back alive. That is a relief. The demons are not gone, but we have at least bought ourselves a moment to breathe. Thanks to you, we may sleep in some peace tonight. Get your rest while you can, adventurer. This fight will not end easily.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Demon Overseer]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (1x)

The One in Command.rewards:
1000 Experience
300 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Legendary Weapon|Random Legendary Weapon]]
1 [[Gold Coin Chest|Unique Gold Coin Chest]]

The Demons Below.greetingtext: More demons have appeared deep within the Forgotten Castle. And we still don't even know what's causing the plague. Things aren't looking good. If this keeps up, something far worse could be waiting for us. Adventurer, please. Put an end to those demons from the Inferno.
The Demons Below.completetext: I knew you'd pull it off. You've done a great job, truly. More than anything, I'm glad you made it back in one piece. Come now, have a seat. Let me pour you a pint of the finest ale in all the realm. Once you've had a good swig, tell me your tale from the Inferno.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Undead]] [[Skeleton]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (25x), Kill [[Abomination]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (5x), Kill [[Cerberus]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (3x), Kill [[Hell Hunter]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (5x)

A Simple Test.greetingtext: Welcome. If you are looking for information or companions, you have come to the right place. This is where adventurers and rumors tend to gather. But information often comes with danger. I do not give work to just anyone. If you want a contract, show me what you can do.
A Simple Test.completetext: Well done. You can tell at a glance whether someone is a prepared adventurer or just pretending by how they deal with the undead. You are the real thing.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Undead]] (1x)

A Simple Test.rewards:
5 Experience
10 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Uncommon Armor|Random Uncommon Armor]]

Worth Taking.greetingtext: There are more useful items in a dungeon than you might expect, including things you can obtain without having to fight every monster. If I were to offer one piece of advice, do not pass by the small chests in the old castle. Take a closer look, and you may find something better than you expected.
Worth Taking.completetext: I hope you found something worthwhile. Those who come back with decent loot usually return here for an ale. If you have a little coin to spare, why not have a drink yourself.

objectives.objectivessummary: Interact with [[Small Oak Chest]] (1x)

10 Experience
20 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Uncommon Weapon|Random Uncommon Weapon]]

What Matters Most.greetingtext: As you know, the old castle is a dangerous place. With a bit of luck, you might find valuable gear or coin. But none of it matters unless you make it back alive. Adventurer, explore the Forgotten Castle and return safely.
What Matters Most.completetext: You made it back without injury. That is good to see. With this level of skill, I can trust you with proper contracts from here on.

objectives.objectivessummary: Survive [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (1x)

What Matters Most.rewards:

Frostbitten Pursuit.greetingtext: As always, I'm after something valuable, but this land is plagued with these beasts—Frost Wolves. I need you to thin them out, clear the path, so I can get what I'm after without being interrupted by these vile creatures.
Frostbitten Pursuit.completetext: Fantastic. You've done well. Now, go ahead and rest up; I'm sure you've earned it. Come see me soon when you're ready to continue. We're not done yet.

Collector's List.greetingtext: I have quite a long list of curious items I'm pursuing, but we'll start with these. They may not seem like much on their own, but I assure you, they will help complete my collection. Once you bring them to me, I'll entrust you with the next request.
Collector's List.completetext: These are just the pieces I needed. There's still much more to gather, but go ahead and thaw out. When you're ready, come back for the next task. We're far from finished.

Fortune's Favor.greetingtext: I received a request from the Fortune Teller, but of course she asked for an item I passed on to another collector not long ago. I have a few favors to ask of her myself, and I would rather not lose her goodwill over something so trivial. I will need to acquire it again. Would you help me? It should not be too difficult to find.
Fortune's Favor.completetext: Good. I will see that these are delivered properly. The Fortune Teller and I sometimes seek things that may seem a little peculiar to others. But I do not concern myself with what people say. We know exactly what it is we must do.

The Ordinary and the Extraordinary.greetingtext: Objects found within dungeons may seem common, yet they are never truly ordinary. At times, the essence of the land or its creatures seeps into them, transforming them into something entirely different. Of course, most may be discarded, but if even the slightest possibility lies within... is that not worth the attempt?
The Ordinary and the Extraordinary.completetext: The true worth of an object shines only in the hands of one who can recognize it. This one is no different. Thanks to you, I have obtained it, and you shall have your rightful reward. You have done well.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Shackles]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled)

Frost Mountain Ascent.greetingtext: I've been hearing of a wonderous gadgetry up on the great peak out yonder. Might you do my bidding and have a look out there?
Frost Mountain Ascent.completetext: Such curiosities! I wonder who could have built such vast structures. We'll need to prepare an expedition in the future!

Peculiar Collections.greetingtext: You may not know it, but I place a fair amount of trust in you. I believe that, no matter how strange an item I ask for, you would see it done. This request is no different. It is no different from the tasks I have asked of you before. Now then, would you bring me a few items?
Peculiar Collections.completetext: Thank you. One of your finer qualities is that you do not ask how or where I intend to use these things. Now then, here is your compensation.

Glacial Conquest.completetext: My my, you've proven your strength. I shouldn't have underestimate you.

Beast of Frost Mountain.greetingtext: This time, the task will be a bit more difficult. The yetis of Frost Mountain resemble apes, but they are far larger. Despite their massive size, they are incredibly swift and cunning. If you can bring that creature down, I'll be willing to consider a new offer.
Beast of Frost Mountain.completetext: Truly impressive. It's been some time since I've seen an adventurer of your skill. I hope you won't take offense. This wasn't meant as a test. But after watching so many missions end in bitter failure, I'm sure you can understand my caution. In any case, you've earned my trust now, and I intend to reward you accordingly.

Morbid Souvenirs.greetingtext: What I'd give to have a trophy of those ferocious beasts up on the mountains. Get me what I need an I'll make it worthwhile.
Morbid Souvenirs.completetext: You're proving more and more valuable to me. I'll be sure to call on you when I have another interesting deal.

Offerings to the Sea.greetingtext: Long ago, the merfolk are said to have offered themselves as sacrifices to calm the fury of the sea after committing a great wrong. Most dismiss it as an old tale, but I do not. Did you know there were once far more merfolk than there are today? There must be a hidden truth behind it. I want you to find out whether a merfolk grave truly exists within the Blue Maelstrom.
Offerings to the Sea.completetext: My word! Bound in ropes and sunk beneath the waves, you say? Remarkable. This could be compelling evidence that something from the merfolk legend truly happened. Were they truly sacrifices, just as the stories claim? Or is there another truth we've yet to uncover? Fascinating. That place certainly deserves a closer investigation.

objectives.objectivessummary: Explore [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/ShipGraveyard-01-N ShipGraveyard] Mermaid Tomb module (1x)

125 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Rare Armor|Random Rare Armor]]
200 Experience

Echoes of the Sirens.greetingtext: I assembled a team to investigate the Blue Maelstrom, but their progress is slower than a slug. They say the merfolk there attack without hesitation. And to make matters worse, even the ones thought to be dead have begun to move again. I need your help. Deal with those wretched things, would you?
Echoes of the Sirens.completetext: Well done. Thanks to you, we'll be able to continue our investigation without trouble for a while. Here, take this. I hope it serves as a reward worthy of your efforts.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Mermaid]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/ShipGraveyard-01-N ShipGraveyard] dungeon (3x), Kill [[Mermaid Corpse]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/ShipGraveyard-01-N ShipGraveyard] dungeon (5x)

Legacy of the Mermaids.greetingtext: It's well known that merfolk lure people with their enchanting songs. But what fascinates me more is the merfolk themselves. Their shimmering, iridescent scales and the crystals known as mermaid's tears. The tears in particular are said to form at the very moment their breath leaves them, like a final scream. What do you say, adventurer? If you can bring these to me, I promise the reward will not disappoint.
Legacy of the Mermaids.completetext: These scales have such a strange and mesmerizing hue. And this tear, this translucent droplet-shaped crystal, expands my view once more despite all the gems I've collected over the years. It is truly a breathtaking beauty.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Mermaid Scale]] (any rarity) (3x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Mermaid's Tear]] (any rarity) (3x) (Looted/Handled)

Chilled Vengeance.greetingtext: Been getting reports of some terrible beasts up on the mountain harassing my kin. Can you do a favor and take them out?
Chilled Vengeance.completetext: That's pretty impressive. Those beasts weren't pushovers. Hope these items make up for your time.

Mountain's Inhabitants.completetext: Hmm, some of these are a bit bloody, but no worries, I'll have them cleaned up in no time.

Gold-Cloaked Secrets.completetext: Let's see what secrets I can uncover with these artifacts. I'll let you know if I discover anything. In the meantime, here have these items.

Fable or Fact.completetext: Hmm I'm starting to notice a pattern. I think a few more pieces and I'll have unraveled their origin.

Silent Observer.completetext: Ah ha! That bowl was the missing link! This is all very interesting. Hmmm... a land lost to the sea. I apologize. I'm getting ahead of myself.

Unusual Find.greetingtext: Thanks to the efforts of many adventurers, items tied to demons have become rather easy to obtain of late. As a result, much has already been studied. Such things do not interest me. I seek what no one truly knows, what has yet to be properly understood. An adventurer like you should be able to find such things, would you not? I will see that you are well rewarded.
Unusual Find.completetext: Oh, this is unmistakably different. It goes far beyond anything described in the records. Discoveries like this are why I cannot stop collecting. Your reward, as promised. You have my thanks.

Not of Our Forge.greetingtext: Those who have ventured into the lower reaches of the Forgotten Castle all speak of its foul air. Yet within it, the demons move unharmed, even wielding gear not unlike our own. I wonder what sets their equipment apart from ours. Would you bring me something they used? It need not be intact.
Not of Our Forge.completetext: Oh, do take a look at this. Scorched and fouled... I cannot tell what this is made of. It does not seem to be ordinary iron... Best to have a specialist examine it.

Beyond Ordinary.greetingtext: Wings are usually seen as little more than a bodily organ. Yet in the world of demons, it is said they carry a different meaning. Not merely for movement, but a display of the power they wield and the rank they hold. If that is true, would not the wings of a stronger demon bear something... distinct?
Beyond Ordinary.completetext: I am no expert, but the aura that lingers in this fragment is unmistakably strange. The longer I look at it... the more it stirs an unease I cannot quite explain. And yet, for those such as myself, it is precisely such objects that hold the greatest value.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Torn Wing Fragment]] (any rarity) (2x) (Looted/Handled)

1000 Experience

The Collector's Desire.greetingtext: Adventurer, there are many like me who seek rare and elusive relics. Such a pursuit is no mere pastime, but a noble path of inquiry. Ancient legends, hidden treasures, remnants of the past, traces of monsters... anything will do. Bring me what is truly rare, and you shall be handsomely rewarded.
The Collector's Desire.completetext: Oh... this is truly of great worth. I cannot deny that not only your skill, but also your eye for rarity grows keener with each step. Since you have brought me such a treasure, I shall grant you something special in return. And should you uncover more marvels in your journey ahead, be sure to bring them to me.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Seal of Dominion]] (any rarity) (5x) (Looted/Handled)

Wagers and Favors.greetingtext: The Collector lost badly in a wager with the Goblin Merchant, and now the debt has fallen to me. I suppose that is the price of an old favor I once owed him. To settle it, I'll need a few valuables. Bring them to me, and I promise a reward worthy of your effort.
Wagers and Favors.completetext: Impressive! These gleaming gems will do the trick. The Collector will be satisfied, and you've more than earned your compensation.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Gem Ring]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Gem Necklace]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled)

Wagers and Favors.rewards:
30 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Uncommon Weapon|Random Uncommon Weapon]]
25 Experience

A Legacy of Pain.greetingtext: Greetings. I've been occupied with a few matters lately—settling the debts of those who've passed and informing their kin of the burdens left behind. It's a task that doesn't get easier with time. But what's more unsettling is the way these poor souls have been treated. Branded, tortured like animals, only to waste away in silence until death claims them. One of my patrons has provided me with a lead. They believe they know where their loved one was found. I think we should investigate.
A Legacy of Pain.completetext: The evidence you uncovered paints a grim picture of what's happening. The ritualistic marks, the suffering... But if the rumors are true, and someone or something is devouring their souls, I wonder... Come back soon. I need to look into something.

objectives.objectivessummary: Explore [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] Outer Cemetery module (1x)

A Legacy of Pain.rewards:
30 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Uncommon Armor|Random Uncommon Armor]]
25 Experience

Whispers of the Devoured.greetingtext: You're back. Good. I've been mulling over something—rumors of creatures that devour souls. The wraiths are the first of many, I suspect. If we slay them, perhaps the souls trapped in this cycle will find rest. And if we're lucky, those still living might snap out of whatever trance they're in. It's a long shot, but it's a start.
Whispers of the Devoured.completetext: The wraith is gone, but sadly, no change in the living. I'll need to do some research and figure out what our next move should be. Come back soon; we'll need to plan more precisely and carefully than when I'm balancing the books.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Wraith]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (1x)

Whispers of the Devoured.rewards:
30 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
5 [[Lockpick|Common Lockpick]]
1 [[Random Uncommon Armor|Random Uncommon Armor]]
40 Experience
10 Affinity

Buried Secrets.greetingtext: Rumors suggest that the bodies within may have been among the first to be subjected to the same ritualistic torment as those more recent poor souls. Search for any clues—check if their tongues were severed or if strange markings are carved into their flesh. We can't be sure until we investigate. If there's any connection, we need to understand it before this spreads further.
Buried Secrets.completetext: One of the bodies did indeed bear markings similar to those we've encountered before—though they seem slightly different. This suggests a deeper, darker evolution of whatever is at play. We're not done yet, though. I'll need more time to piece these findings together. Come back soon.

objectives.objectivessummary: Explore [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] Abandoned Sanctuary module (1x)

Buried Secrets.rewards:
50 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Uncommon Weapon|Random Uncommon Weapon]]
50 Experience

Easing the Burden.greetingtext: When I think of those poor souls and their families, left to bear the weight of debts they never agreed to, my heart grows heavy. It is a cruel irony that the dead leave behind not only sorrow but financial ruin. I wish to help free them, but to do so we must gather the necessary funds. Bring me some silver coins, and we can begin to ease their suffering.
Easing the Burden.completetext: Good work. This is a solid start, but it won't be enough to clear all the debts left behind by the dead. We'll need more, but at least we're on the right path. For now, this will help begin the process of easing their suffering.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Silver Coin]] (any rarity) (10x) (Looted/Handled)

Easing the Burden.rewards:
50 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Uncommon Armor|Random Uncommon Armor]]
50 Experience

Misplaced Muffin.greetingtext: Nice to see you again. The families are starting to feel the weight lift, and I'm hoping there's something of real value hidden inside those Mimics. Whatever we find could go a long way in easing their suffering.
Misplaced Muffin.completetext: Good work. The families have asked me to express their gratitude. One even baked you a Chocolate Chip Muffin as a token of thanks. Unfortunately, I seem to have misplaced it... though I swear I didn't eat it. In any case, the silver and other valuables you've brought will make a real difference.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Mimic]] (2x)

Misplaced Muffin.rewards:
50 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
4 [[Arcane Essence|Uncommon Arcane Essence]]
75 Experience
5 Affinity

Ceremonial Cup.greetingtext: I've heard whispers—dark rumors—of a chalice, one used in the first rituals. It's said to lie hidden in the Forgotten Castle, a relic of blood and shadows. I don't need to tell you that it's no ordinary artifact. It's something far darker. Something that could give us the answers we desperately seek, or drag us deeper into this abyss. I need you to find it before it's too late. The darkness is spreading, and we need to understand what secrets it holds before they consume us all.
Ceremonial Cup.completetext: The chalice you've brought back is undeniably foul, a palpable darkness clinging to it like a stain. But is it the one we need? I'll send it to someone more skilled in these matters to confirm our findings. In the meantime, I've been informed of other pressing issues that will require your attention sooner rather than later.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Silver Chalice]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Gold Goblet]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled)

Ceremonial Cup.rewards:
100 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Rare Armor|Random Rare Armor]]
3 [[Great Potion of Luck|Epic Great Potion of Luck]]
200 Experience

Purging the Path.greetingtext: There's a definite darkness to the chalice you found. While it's still being researched, I've been informed that there were many pieces used in the original ceremony, fragments we still don't fully understand. My contact is still digging deeper, but it's suggested that the answers to some of these missing pieces may lie within the King's Treasure Room. However, we'll need to clear out any undead protectors lingering there before we can get close to the truth. Once you've dealt with the threats inside, come see me. We may be closer than we think, but this task is far from over.
Purging the Path.completetext: The information you gathered was helpful to my contact and is leading us deeper into the mystery. We're starting to piece things together, though there's still much left to uncover. The truth is closer now, but it's going to take time to fully understand the significance of what we're dealing with. Return soon—the next step of this journey is just ahead.

objectives.objectivessummary: Explore [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] Treasure Room module (1x), Kill [[Skeleton Champion]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (1x), Kill [[Wraith]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (1x)

Purging the Path.rewards:
100 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
4 [[Arcane Essence|Rare Arcane Essence]]
200 Experience

Throne of the Forsaken.greetingtext: The Inferno holds many secrets, but there's one we're desperate to uncover. The fallen king's throne lies deep within its fiery depths, and you've been chosen to find it. Your task is clear: locate the throne and examine it for any unusual markings, glyphs, or relics. Every detail could hold significance. The throne may contain clues about the ritual, or perhaps the king's true fate. We need to understand what's hidden within.
Throne of the Forsaken.completetext: The throne has revealed more than we expected—its markings tell a story of power, loss, and untold secrets. But this is only the beginning. What we've uncovered is just a piece of the puzzle, and I fear the answers we seek lie deeper within the Inferno. You've seen enough to know there's more to be found, though the path forward remains unclear. There's a door that awaits, one that has been sealed for far too long. Once you're ready, we'll need to face whatever lies beyond it.

objectives.objectivessummary: Explore [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] Demon Throne module (1x)

Throne of the Forsaken.rewards:
100 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Arcane Essence|Rare Arcane Essence]]
1 [[Random Rare Weapon|Random Rare Weapon]]
175 Experience
25 Affinity

Iron Tight.greetingtext: Deep below The Forgotten Castle lies an iron door sealed shut. It is known to be heavily guarded... but the reason why is still unknown. I need you to go find out what that reason might be.
Iron Tight.completetext: I didn't think you had it in you... you really do know your way around down there. Don't go too far, I will be needing your skills again soon.

1 [[Random Rare Armor|Random Rare Armor]]

Something Marvelous.greetingtext: Rumors of a grand chest filled with blessed riches have echoed around these parts for years... but after hearing some tavern talk, I am convinced I know where it sits. If you think you have what it takes, I will guide you on your way to open it once and for all!
Something Marvelous.completetext: That chest held everything I imagined and more! If you find yourself a few more chests like that, you might become the richest adventurer in town!

1.summary: Interact with [[Marvelous Chest]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (1x)

A Legendary Addition.greetingtext: It seems you have proven your ability to explore the more dangerous parts of that castle. Now I must seek an item once used in a ritual. However, its quality and condition must be excellent. The deeper you go, the easier it will be to find such a thing.
A Legendary Addition.completetext: I knew you would find it, but I didn't expect you to be so quick! I hope this reward is fair compensation for your tremendous effort.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Ceremonial Dagger|Epic Ceremonial Dagger]] (1x) (Looted/Handled)

Gold Rush.greetingtext: As we prepare for the battles ahead, remember, it's not just your weapons and armor that need upgrading. Your coffers must grow as well! Let's make some financial gains to ensure we're prepared for the unexpected.
Gold Rush.completetext: Excellent plundering! With each haul from the chests, your riches grow evermore.

Behind The Stone.greetingtext: I have heard stories of a stone door deep below The Forgotten Castle... It is said to hold unimaginable legendary treasures, so, how does a hunt sound?
Behind The Stone.completetext: You've truly found it! When I first sent you on this journey, I never believed the legends were real. Yet here you are, proving me wrong—and bringing a myth to life.

Bangle Lord.greetingtext: Recently, more people have been searching for bangles of exceptional quality. Do you happen to know where such things might be found? If fortune favors you, you may find them among the piles of treasure in that haunted castle. But be careful. You will not be the only one searching for them.
Bangle Lord.completetext: These are perfect! How did you manage to find bangles in this condition? You really have a knack for getting the good stuff.

Superior Equipment.greetingtext: What do you believe ensures safety in an adventure? Skill, of course, is essential. But when skill levels are equal, what makes the difference? Superior equipment. Unfortunately, while decent gear is easy to find here, truly exceptional equipment is rare. In truth, many such treasures lie buried deep within the Forgotten Castle, hidden among hoards of riches. You should seek them out.
Superior Equipment.completetext: I hope you found something of value. I trust in your skill, but I have seen far too many adventurers who relied solely on their abilities—only to never return. I wish to continue doing business with you, so always ensure you are well-prepared.

1.summary: Interact with [[Treasure Hoard]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (15x)

What the Alchemist Seeks.greetingtext: Do you remember the stone door you opened last time? Now that we know for certain that treasures lie beyond such doors, we must investigate the rumors of other sealed passages as well. Open them and see what lies beyond. And... if you come across any treasure that carries a strange aura, be sure to let me know.
What the Alchemist Seeks.completetext: Was there nothing unusual? I see... Actually, I've heard that an Alchemist has been searching for something lately. As you know, Alchemists will do anything in the name of their experiments—whether for good or ill, it hardly matters to them. This time, he's looking for a particular item, and I find that concerning... If I find out what exactly he seeks, I will let you know.

1.summary: Interact with [[Golden Door]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (1x)

1 [[Random Epic Weapon|Random Epic Weapon]]

The Ominous Crown.greetingtext: I've discovered what the Alchemist is searching for—a cursed crown. No matter what is done to it, it remains unscathed, and the gemstone at its center glows even in complete darkness. Can you find it before he does? I do not know what curse it carries, but this time, the Alchemist must not be allowed to obtain it. I have a bad feeling about this.
The Ominous Crown.completetext: This seems to be the one. It's a relief that you found it first. Please keep this matter a secret from the Alchemist. I know he has accomplished remarkable things and has helped many people, but I worry that one day, he may cross a line he cannot return from. I only hope that day never comes.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Gold Crown|Legend Gold Crown]] (1x) (Looted/Handled)

The Ominous Crown.rewards:
200 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Epic Armor|Random Epic Armor]]
1 [[Random Epic Weapon|Random Epic Weapon]]
2 [[Arcane Essence|Epic Arcane Essence]]
1 [[Gold Coin Chest|Unique Gold Coin Chest]]
1000 Experience

Culling For Love.greetingtext: The season of love has come... yet the air is still filled with death. Skeletons, goblins, kobolds... the plague is spreading to everything that moves. For now, ending those who carry it seems to be the only way to slow its spread. I sincerely ask for your help.
Culling For Love.completetext: We may not be able to stop the spreading plague all at once, but if everyone lends their strength as you have, it will buy us time to restore the balance of love. Please, take this rose. It once bloomed in darkness, but through purification, it has regained its true fragrance. A living testament that, with love, anything can be restored.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Undead]] [[Skeleton]] (10x), Kill [[Beast]] [[Goblin]] (10x), Kill [[Beast]] [[Kobold]] (10x)

Culling For Love.rewards:
1 [[Black Rose|Poor Black Rose]]
1 [[Random Epic Armor|Random Epic Armor]]

Leading The Charge.greetingtext: Even the strongest creatures are not immune to this plague. Many adventurers avoid the riskiest encounters, but someone must face them. If you lead the way, I will make sure the risk is worth it.
Leading The Charge.completetext: I know it wasn't easy, but your courage will pave the way forward. Sometimes, love spreads through the most unexpected paths.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Skeleton Champion]] (1x), Kill [[Yeti]] (1x), Kill [[Giant Centipede]] (1x)

Leading The Charge.rewards:
3 [[Heart Candy|Unique Heart Candy]]
1 [[Random Epic Armor|Random Epic Armor]]

Plague Watch.greetingtext: I have yet to measure the true extent of this rot. Search everywhere you can. We must continue to monitor the situation.
Plague Watch.completetext: This is exactly what I needed to know. Our combined efforts are working. If we keep this up, love will surely prevail.

objectives.objectivessummary: Survive [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (1x), Survive [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/GoblinCave-01-N Goblin Cave] dungeon (1x), Survive [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/IceCavern-01-N Ice Cavern] dungeon (1x)

Plague Watch.rewards:
3 [[Heart Candy|Unique Heart Candy]]
1 [[Random Epic Weapon|Random Epic Weapon]]

The First Step of Love.greetingtext: The Black Rose has become a symbol of resistance against this plague. Once steeped in darkness, it has now been fully purified, bearing a new kind of beauty and fragrance. Bring me one, and I will reward you for your effort.
The First Step of Love.completetext: It may not be a grand reward, but if you continue to help keep this plague at bay, I will find a way to offer you something better.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Black Rose]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled)

The First Step of Love.rewards:
1 [[Gold Coin Pouch|Unique Gold Coin Pouch]]
50 Affinity

Going All In.greetingtext: You are clearly making a difference, Adventurer. As more people join you in purpose, we will be able to overcome this trial all the sooner. As a token of that journey, would you bring me three Black Roses?
Going All In.completetext: I know it was no easy task, but I hope this reward brings you some small comfort. As long as we do not give up, we will surely see this through.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Black Rose]] (any rarity) (3x) (Looted/Handled)

Going All In.rewards:
1 [[Gold Coin Bag|Unique Gold Coin Bag]]
50 Affinity

Bringer of Love.greetingtext: There is no defeat for the power of love. If you can gather ten Black Roses, that alone will stand as a great sign of encouragement in this arduous fight. It may take time, but I ask that you see it through to the very end.
Bringer of Love.completetext: You have taken the lead in restoring the balance of love through your efforts. You are truly a Bringer of Love. I hope this gift can repay you for all that you have done.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Black Rose]] (any rarity) (10x) (Looted/Handled)

Bringer of Love.rewards:
3 [[Gold Coin Bag|Unique Gold Coin Bag]]
50 Affinity

Cobalt Ingot.conversationtext: There is a familiar face! Supply me with some Cobalt ore and I will quickly turn them into pure Cobalt ingots.
Cobalt Ingot.craftcompletetext: Now that's a wonderful metal! There is nothing quite like shimmering Cobalt.

Copper Ingot.conversationtext: In need of refined Copper? Provide me with the ore, and I'll smelt and craft it into high-quality copper ingots. Let's get started.
Copper Ingot.craftcompletetext: Your copper ingots are ready. Smooth, strong, and shining. Ready for use!

Froststone Ingot.conversationtext: You wish to meld ice and stone into something extraordinary? Even the improbable is possible in my seasoned hands.
Froststone Ingot.craftcompletetext: Ah, an exceptional meld of froststone that even the Frost Giants would respect and utilize in their crafts.

Gold Ingot.conversationtext: Supply me with gold ore and with skilled hands, I will smelt you pure gold ingots, traveler.
Gold Ingot.craftcompletetext: Now there is a metal of beauty! Gleaming gold ingots, smelted in marvelous quality.

Iron Ingot.conversationtext: Welcome back! If you have Iron ore, I can work my magic and turn it into top-quality Iron ingots. Just leave it to me.
Iron Ingot.craftcompletetext: These Iron ingots turned out perfectly! Strong, reliable, and ready for use. Iron like this is hard to come by.

Obsidian Ingot.conversationtext: Did you bring obsidian ore? If you hand it over to me, I'll refine it into a high-quality obsidian ingot by removing the impurities.
Obsidian Ingot.craftcompletetext: The obsidian ingot is ready. Take a look at its smooth, light-reflecting surface.

Rubysilver Ingot.conversationtext: It always amazes me that you can extract such a magical metal from such ugly stone.
Rubysilver Ingot.craftcompletetext: Now that there is an amazing metal! There is nothing quite like pure elegant Rubysilver.

Silver Ingot.conversationtext: Welcome! Bring me your silver coins or ore and I'll work them into pristine ingots.
Silver Ingot.craftcompletetext: Here you go, beautiful right? Silver has a charm all its own.

Tidestone Ingot.conversationtext: In need of refined Tidestone? Bring me the raw ore, and I will forge it into high-quality Tidestone ingots.
Tidestone Ingot.craftcompletetext: The Tidestone ingot is complete. Items forged from this ingot will perform especially well underwater.

Frostlight Crystal Sword.craftcompletetext: Your weapons stand ready, their Froststone edges sharp enough to carve through bone and blizzard alike.

Rubysilver Halberd.craftcompletetext: The weapon is complete. This RubySilver weapon will make your skill shine even brighter.

Obsidian Stiletto Dagger.craftcompletetext: The weapon is complete. It is honed to a fine edge and may wound with the slightest touch, so handle it with care.

Tombstone.greetingtext: Stone tombs, and coffins... The Forgotten Castle has an abundance of them... I bet some of them have never even been opened, but you might have to fight to be the first. What do you say?
Tombstone.completetext: Your hands tell the story... so don't bother telling it to me. Here, these might make it easier for you next time!

The Statues Are Alive.greetingtext: Some fool came into the Tavern last night speaking of “Living Statues” flying around the Ruins... I haven't ever seen such a thing, but would you mind taking a look?
The Statues Are Alive.completetext: Wow... and here I was thinking how ridiculous that sounded. Those Ruins are getting more dangerous by the day.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Living Statue]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (2x)

3 [[Trap Disarming Kit|Uncommon Trap Disarming Kit]]
3 [[Potion of Protection|Uncommon Potion of Protection]]
50 Experience

Farm It or Buy It.greetingtext: I am in urgent need of Gold Ore. I am not sure how you will obtain it, but if you do, I will make it worth your while!
Farm It or Buy It.completetext: You brought these a lot faster than I expected... I guess you were prepared. If you come back later I might be able to craft something special for you.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Gold Ore]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled)

Farm It or Buy It.rewards:
50 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Arcane Essence|Uncommon Arcane Essence]]
1 [[Random Uncommon Armor|Random Uncommon Armor]]
75 Experience
25 Affinity

Forbidden Craft.greetingtext: My great-grandfather was a master craftsman. Long ago he learned the forging techniques of the dwarves, but that knowledge led him down the wrong path. Using forbidden methods, he forged enchanted daggers and paid a heavy price. I intend to set right the mistakes of the past and forge a weapon that surpasses them through honest skill. For now, bring me a few fine weapons. Examining them will be the first step.
Forbidden Craft.completetext: These weapons will work. With them, I can begin the real work, but there's more to this story. My great-grandfather spoke of an ancient sword hidden in Frost Mountain—crafted by the Dwarves who taught him... Well need to investigate this soon, but let's rest for now.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch Uncommon Weapon (3x)

Forbidden Craft.rewards:
100 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Uncommon Weapon|Random Uncommon Weapon]]
200 Experience

Tales of Power.greetingtext: Let me tell you more. My great-grandfather once ventured into Frost Mountain, drawn by tales of a sword of great power. It was said to be forged by the same Dwarves who taught him their craft. If this sword is real, it could be the key to completing his legacy—and mine. Find it, and I'll finally understand what he couldn't.
Tales of Power.completetext: You've found it. This sword... it's more than I expected. I can feel its power, but it's not just a weapon—it's tied to something darker... We”ll have to travel back to the swords resting place and unveil its tainted history. Maybe those forsaken frost spiders guarding it that have plagued my lineage for centuries will give us a clue.

objectives.objectivessummary: Explore [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/IceCavern-01-N Ice Cavern] Pyramid module (1x)

Tales of Power.rewards:
100 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
3 [[Random Rare Weapon|Random Rare Weapon]]
200 Experience

Growing Whispers.greetingtext: Those spiders are not mere creatures. They are part of the curse that has followed my family for generations. My great-grandfather fought them as well and nearly lost his life in the process. If you could slay those wretched spiders, I would be able to study the sword in peace. I would be grateful for your help.
Growing Whispers.completetext: They're dead, but something isn't right. I can feel the sword changing me, just like it did my great-grandfather...The whispers are growing louder. I'm not sure how much longer I can resist... But we can't stop now. I'll need more from you soon...

1.summary: Kill [[Ice Giant Spider]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/IceCavern-01-N Ice Cavern] dungeon (3x)

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Ice Giant Spider]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/IceCavern-01-N Ice Cavern] dungeon (3x)

Growing Whispers.rewards:
100 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
3 [[Random Rare Weapon|Random Rare Weapon]]
175 Experience
25 Affinity

In Search of the Dwarven Land.greetingtext: I never imagined the dwarves' ancient homeland would lie beneath the mountain range, connected to the Goblin Caves. There was a reason we could not find even the slightest trace, no matter how thoroughly we searched Frost Mountain. At last, we can investigate the proper place. Adventurer, please confirm the dwarves' land.
In Search of the Dwarven Land.completetext: Molten lava cascading like a waterfall... Their forges must be boiling at unimaginable heat. Now I see why dwarven craftsmanship advanced so far. No matter the effort, there are limits to how hot a fire can burn. But the land they lived in already provided perfect conditions.

1.summary: Explore [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/GoblinCave-01-N Goblin Cave] Magma Falls module (1x)

objectives.objectivessummary: Explore [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/GoblinCave-01-N Goblin Cave] Magma Falls module (1x)

In Search of the Dwarven Land.rewards:
100 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
4 [[Arcane Essence|Rare Arcane Essence]]
200 Experience

The Potential of Obsidian.greetingtext: Obsidian is so rare that it is usually traded only as expensive jewelry. But weapons forged from obsidian are said to be sharper than those made from any other material. If you can bring me a small amount of obsidian, I will try forging one myself.
The Potential of Obsidian.completetext: Well done. This is the first time I have seen an obsidian ore of this size. The dwarves must have refined their craft by working with many different minerals since long ago. For a craftsman like me, this is like a dream come true.
The Potential of Obsidian.requiredquest: In Search of the Dwarven Land

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Obsidian Ore]] (any rarity) (3x) (Looted/Handled)

The Potential of Obsidian.rewards:
100 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Rare Armor|Random Rare Armor]]
200 Experience

What the Dwarves Made.greetingtext: My great-grandfather even learned his craft from the dwarves, yet now we cannot communicate with them at all... If that is the case, conflict seems inevitable. If I cannot ask them directly, then I would like to examine the tools they have made instead. Their condition does not matter, so please bring me as many as you can.
What the Dwarves Made.completetext: Even though most of it has melted beyond recognition the condition of what remains intact is astonishing. This durability and smoothness... the dwarves are not called master craftsmen without reason. Yet I sense no unusual magic here. Then where exactly was the dagger I inherited made...

1.summary: Kill [[Dwarf Handcannoneer]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/GoblinCave-01-N Goblin Cave] dungeon (5x)

2.summary: Kill [[Dwarf Mauler]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/GoblinCave-01-N Goblin Cave] dungeon (5x)

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Dwarf Handcannoneer]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/GoblinCave-01-N Goblin Cave] dungeon (5x), Kill [[Dwarf Mauler]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/GoblinCave-01-N Goblin Cave] dungeon (5x), Fetch [[Melted Pickaxe Head]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled)

A Lot of Pots.greetingtext: That castle is filled with old pots, I once found a legendary Falchion inside one. Why not shatter a few and see what fortune awaits? It's tradition around these parts.
A Lot of Pots.completetext: You might not have found anything legendary, but at least have these weapons for your trouble.

1.summary: Destroy Pot in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (10x) (single session)

Something Good In Something Small.greetingtext: Those pots might not have held what you're looking for... but surely the chests scattered throughout the castle grounds will. Why don't you open up a few and report back what you find?
Something Good In Something Small.completetext: I know that was a lot of work, but here! Hopefully, this makes it worth your time.

1.summary: Interact with [[Small Oak Chest]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (25x)

1 [[Random Epic Armor|Random Epic Armor]]

Golden Dreams.greetingtext: If you are willing to push the limits of your safety, I can make it worth your time! I just need you to open a few Golden Chests, they are plentiful inside The Forgotten Castle. By the way, you'll need to bring lockpicks to open those chests!
Golden Dreams.completetext: I knew you wouldn't regret it! Just look at all the valuables you brought back... and you get to keep this gift from me!

1.summary: Interact with [[Golden Chest]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (5x)

1000 Experience
