Culling the Enemy.greetingtext: Good timing. Unfortunately, we'll have to put our side mission on hold. A surge in monsters is wreaking havoc, and I'm almost certain it's tied to what we were investigating. It feels like something doesn't want us getting any closer. Even my trade routes are overrun by these beasts, so the sooner you help me clear them out, the sooner we can get back on track.
Culling the Enemy.completetext: Well done, adventurer. With those beasts cleared out, my trade routes are safe again, and we can finally get back on track. I have a feeling we're closer to uncovering the truth than ever before. Hopefully, nothing else slows us down.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Harpy]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (15x), Kill [[Living Armor]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (20x), Kill [[Ruins Golem]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (9x)

Culling the Enemy.rewards:
150 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Epic Armor|Random Epic Armor]]
350 Experience
25 Affinity

Gathering Progress.greetingtext: Remember that list I mentioned earlier with the glowing bug parts? There are a few more items we need to gather: some rotten fluids, high quality weapons, and ten armor scraps. It's not a pleasant task, but I know you can handle it.
Gathering Progress.completetext: Excellent work. While my wife's health remains unchanged, the presence of family has lifted my spirits. These items should help us make progress, and I'm grateful for your dedication.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Rotten Fluids]] (any rarity) (10x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Armor Scrap]] (any rarity) (10x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch Rare Weapon (10x)

Gathering Progress.rewards:
150 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Epic Armor|Random Epic Armor]]
350 Experience

Piercing Heat.greetingtext: I have been racking my brain lately, trying to forge a weapon with greater power. Yet with the materials I possess, I cannot bring my idea to life. There are a few things I require, rare and not easily found. Will you help me?
Piercing Heat.completetext: Thank you. If this turns out as I envision, it will be a weapon unlike any other. When that time comes, I shall craft one for you.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Broken Bone Spike]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Spectral Hilt]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Warlord's Broken Sword Blade]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled)

Piercing Heat.rewards:
150 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Epic Weapon|Random Epic Weapon]]
1000 Experience
50 Affinity

A Weapon That Pierces All.greetingtext: Adventurer, bring me a few weapons that are not easily found. My goal is to forge a blade that can pierce through anything. Though I am still far from completing such a work, I refuse to give up and continue my attempts. This time I intend to test materials that are dangerous to handle. I must study them closely and discover how they might be used.
A Weapon That Pierces All.completetext: These weapons look like the work of dwarves. They're the kind of craftsmen who can forge fine weapons without ever needing to rely on magic. But I suppose that wasn't enough for them. To go even further, they must've reached for forbidden techniques. That hunger to make something better... I think I understand it now.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch Epic Weapon (5x), Fetch [[Smoky Poison Powder]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled)

A Weapon That Pierces All.rewards:
225 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Legendary Weapon|Random Legendary Weapon]]
500 Experience

The Vile Ones.greetingtext: I've heard rumors that new demons have begun to appear in the Inferno. They're stronger, and they hunt adventurers with ruthless precision. It would be ideal to drive them back into the darkness before they fully settle in... but at the very least, we can't just let them grow comfortable. Take them down. I believe if anyone can do it, it's you.
The Vile Ones.completetext: Thanks to you, things should quiet down for a while. I appreciate it. Those creatures... they're born of malice itself. No matter how many you cut down, they just keep coming, like vermin. Until we deal with the source, this fight won't truly be over.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Demon Centaur]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (7x), Kill [[Cerberus]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (7x), Kill [[Demon Executioner]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (7x)

The Vile Ones.rewards:
250 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Arcane Essence|Legend Arcane Essence]]
500 Experience

Out of the Dark.greetingtext: The masters of the dungeon have grown more cunning. Those beasts have slithered into deeper shadows than ever before. Luckily, if you bring the right materials to the alchemist, he says he can craft something to draw them out. I trust his skill well enough, but I prefer certainty over guesswork. Take what he gives you, see if it truly summons those monsters, and if it does, make sure they don't walk away.
Out of the Dark.completetext: By the gods, you mean they actually appeared? I can't tell if that's a blessing or a curse. Still, the fact that you brought them down is news worth hearing. Thank you for risking yourself to uncover the truth.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Ghost King]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (1x), Kill [[Skeleton Warlord]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (1x), Kill [[Lich]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (1x)

Out of the Dark.rewards:
250 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Legendary Armor|Random Legendary Armor]]
1000 Experience

Teachings of Arms.greetingtext: You cannot hope to forge a fine weapon by relying on luck. It takes constant practice, much experience, and even failure to shape something greater. Studying weapons already completed is of great value as well. If you bring me a few good ones, I shall exchange them for a better piece of my own making.
Teachings of Arms.completetext: Thank you for your efforts. These are quite serviceable weapons. If I examine them carefully, I am sure I will learn something from them. Now, as promised, I will give you the weapon I forged. May it serve you well.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch Rare Weapon (3x)

Teachings of Arms.rewards:
1 [[Random Epic Weapon|Random Epic Weapon]]
25 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]

Refinement of Craft.greetingtext: Forging ordinary weapons is not particularly difficult. But producing an exceptional weapon is an entirely different matter. The strength and balance a fine weapon must possess can never be fully learned by study alone. So if you bring me weapons that are a step above the last batch, I will use them as the basis to craft an even finer piece.
Refinement of Craft.completetext: Well done. All of this will serve as the foundation for me to make better weapons. Here, I present a new piece I recently completed. May it be of service to you, adventurer.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch Epic Weapon (3x)

Refinement of Craft.rewards:
1 [[Random Legendary Weapon|Random Legendary Weapon]]
50 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]

The Craftsman's Fruit.greetingtext: Adventurer, the time has come to take on a new tier. Drawing on the experience I have amassed, I intend to forge a weapon surpassing anything I have made so far. To complete it properly I require your aid. If you would procure for me several rare weapons not easily obtained, I shall present to you the fruit of my labour.
The Craftsman's Fruit.completetext: Well done. Thanks to you I have gained much insight and was able to complete this weapon. For now, this is the best my craft can achieve, but I will continue to strive ceaselessly to create something more perfect. For I know that effort will never betray me.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch Legend Weapon (3x)

The Craftsman's Fruit.rewards:
1 [[Random Unique Weapon|Random Unique Weapon]]
100 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]

Campfire Kit.conversationtext: Bring me a few logs of any size, and I'll craft the supplies you need for your journey.
Campfire Kit.craftcompletetext: The item you requested is ready. May it aid you in your adventure.

Woodsman Axe.conversationtext: Bring me a few logs of any size, and I'll craft the supplies you need for your journey.
Woodsman Axe.craftcompletetext: The item you requested is ready. May it aid you in your adventure.

Intricate Wooden Figurine.conversationtext: Bring me a few logs of any size, and I'll craft the supplies you need for your journey.
Intricate Wooden Figurine.craftcompletetext: The item you requested is ready. May it aid you in your adventure.

The Basics.greetingtext: People think it's the beasts that get you in this land, but it's not. It's the cold. The hunger. It gets into your skin, your bones, and slowly, you're dead before you even know it. I've seen too many inexperienced fools wander into the wilderness, too proud to listen to warnings, and they end up like the others. No one dies in their sleep out here unless they're already dead. If you're not careful, hunger and frost will do their work long before the claws of any creature ever get the chance. So it's important to always cover your basics before any adventure.
The Basics.completetext: Those supplies you gathered will keep us from being another casualty of the cold. I know this lesson all too well. There was a time, not long ago, when I lost some of my closest companions to the freezing winter. I wanted to bury them, to give them the peace they deserved, but the earth was locked in ice, cold as death itself. When I finally returned to bury them properly, their bodies had vanished.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Campfire Kit]] (any rarity) (1x)

The Basics.rewards:
30 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Surgical Kit|Common Surgical Kit]]
3 [[Explosive Bottle|Common Explosive Bottle]]
25 Experience
25 Affinity

Invasive Species.greetingtext: A lot of people are helping in the search for the Leathersmith's lost daughter, but not all of them are as capable as you. There's plenty of inexperienced souls stumbling into the wilderness, thinking they can handle it. It's up to us to clear the path and make it safer for those who don't have the skills. We don't want them getting in the way or becoming another burden.
Invasive Species.completetext: Nice job. The path is clearer now, and those less prepared have a better shot at staying alive. It won't be easy, but you've given them a damn good chance. I appreciate the help—stay sharp; we've still got a long way to go.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Dire Wolf]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (3x)

Invasive Species.rewards:
30 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Potion of Luck|Uncommon Potion of Luck]]
1 [[Random Uncommon Armor|Random Uncommon Armor]]
40 Experience

Fortune's Guidance.greetingtext: Glad to see you made it back in one piece. The search for the Leathersmith's daughter has turned up nothing, but I've been digging around... got desperate enough to visit that damn fortune teller. She gave me a place to check—let's see if there's any truth to her cryptic ramblings.
Fortune's Guidance.completetext: Well, I'll be damned. She was right... I don't know how, but it seems we're on the right path. It's a sliver of hope, but it's enough for now. And between you and me, that fortune teller lady freaks me out—she eats bloody eyeballs and all sorts of strange things.

objectives.objectivessummary: Explore [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] Square A module (1x)

Fortune's Guidance.rewards:
30 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Uncommon Armor|Random Uncommon Armor]]
25 Experience
25 Affinity

Vexfly.greetingtext: The insects of the Forgotten Castle are truly a nuisance. The giant dragonflies in particular spit venom at their targets and follow them relentlessly, constantly hindering their movement. We must deal with these filthy pests before they spread any further.
Vexfly.completetext: Well done. This should keep things under control for a while. But since we still don't know the source of those creatures, all we can do is clear them out from time to time. I'll be counting on you again when the time comes.

objectives.objectivessummary: Kill [[Giant Dragonfly]] in [https://darkanddarker.map.spellsandguns.com/map/Crypt-01-N Crypt] dungeon (3x)

Vexfly.rewards:
75 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
1 [[Random Uncommon Weapon|Random Uncommon Weapon]]
50 Experience

The Use of a Forgotten Castle.greetingtext: The cursed castle is full of terrible things, but it sits in a forest long left untouched where good timber can still be found. Sometimes I go there to cut wood and salvage usable pieces from broken remains. If you go to the castle and find good timber, could you bring some back for me?
The Use of a Forgotten Castle.completetext: You found some good usable pieces. Wood is heavy, so it is hard for me to carry much on my own. Thanks to you, my work will be much easier. Thank you.

objectives.objectivessummary: Fetch [[Bavin]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Cracked Log]] (any rarity) (1x) (Looted/Handled), Fetch [[Campfire Kit]] (any rarity) (1x)

The Use of a Forgotten Castle.rewards:
75 [[Gold Coin|Unique Gold Coin]]
2 [[Random Uncommon Weapon|Random Uncommon Weapon]]
50 Experience

Absolutely Batty.greetingtext: Demon bats are the bane of my existence. Every blue moon one of those bastards make it out of their god forsaken hole and wreck havoc on plot. Do me a favor and help me locate where they come from.
Absolutely Batty.completetext: Ew, that place sounds just as disgusting as I'd imagine. I'd suggest you take a bath to get some of that stench off you.
Absolutely Batty.requiredquest: The Use of a Forgotten Castle

Haunting Presence.greetingtext: I used to have a keen sense to detect demonic auras in my youth. Alas, these days that skill has gone to waste. I am curious if you can replicate my odd abilities.
Haunting Presence.completetext: Your skills are impressive as always. Unfortunately your report seems to indicate that darkness has overtaken the castle.

Amidst Peril.greetingtext: That forsaken castle has become the final resting ground for too many overconfident adventurers. I'm not saying you're the same as the rest but I'd be surprised if you could survive more than once.
Amidst Peril.completetext: I was a fool for ever doubting your skills. Here, take these items as a token of my apology.

Infernal Champions.greetingtext: The demonic aura coming from the depths of the castle are so powerful that even my waning abilities can sense them. We need a hero to cleanse the air.
Infernal Champions.completetext: By the gods! You've done it. I haven't felt this calm in years. Unfortunately, I'm not sure how long this will last.

Ember's Amidst Frost.completetext: Ah, nothing more comforting than a crackling campfire amidst the chill of the frost.

Frostbound Carnage.completetext: Impressive! Those giants are renown for their strength and you made it look easy!

Frozen Enigmas.completetext: A frost wyvern?! My dear, what could have compelled the demons to capture such a terrifying beast?

Collect and Deliver.completetext: Good job. I know that taking out those beasts were no easy task. I only hope we put a dent in the plans of the frost demons.

A Dire Request.greetingtext: Please investigate the bridges of the Forgotten Castle and the site where the ritual, tainted by darkness, was once performed. I've heard rumors that if one lingers there for too long, the screams of someone unseen can be heard. I need to know whether this is truth or mere superstition.
A Dire Request.completetext: You truly heard nothing? Truly...? That can't be... Another lead, ending in nothing... Sometimes, it feels suffocating, unbearable. When I think of her, suffering even at this very moment... Haa... Haa... No, this won't do. I need to rest. Please, leave me be for now.

Into the Darkness.greetingtext: There is something I need to find in the Forgotten Castle. But first, the path must be cleared. Beasts and vermin tainted by darkness block the way, and my strength alone is not enough to handle them... Could you eliminate these creatures for me?
Into the Darkness.completetext: Thank you. Traveling through the area has become much easier—at least for now. I hope to find what I'm looking for before those creatures swarm back again... Ah, it's a book. According to the Alchemist, these books could aid his research. Wish me luck.

Ancient Records.greetingtext: I searched through every bookshelf in the Ruins, but with my dull senses, I couldn't find a single thing. This isn't good... I was promised something in exchange for retrieving those books for the Alchemist, something I must obtain. Could you search for the books in my stead? Please, I'm counting on you.
Ancient Records.completetext: Thank you so much. I won't forget your help. Now, I just need to bring this to the Alchemist, and I'll receive a new potion. The effects? ...I'll tell you about them later.
